spawn_entities.name: sudden draft
spawn_entities.description: An unnatural breeze with no source that you can feel in your bones.

examine.message: As you examine the {target}, you feel an icy presence materialize behind you.

hide.message: Your hiding spot grows unnaturally cold, as if something knows exactly where you are.

rest.message: Your moment of rest is interrupted by a bone-chilling cold that seems to seek you out.

use.message: The flame flickers wildly as an unnatural wind extinguishes your light source.

examine.message: The air feels unnaturally cold in one spot, as if something.. no.
The air feels unnaturally cold in one spot, as if something.. no.
A persistent cold draft moves subtly past.
The breeze circles you like.. menacingly?? Papers flutter, you can feel it.. there's no windows open.. Wtf.
An invisible, freezing cold moves through the room with unmistakable intent. Death is here, that fuck!

subtle_chill.description: The air temperature drops noticeably in one area of the room. It feels unnatural.

sensory_feedback.audio: A faint whisper of wind, barely audible.
sensory_feedback.visual: Your breath mists slightly in the air.
sensory_feedback.tactile: The hairs on your arms stand up.

cold_breeze.description: A persistent cold breeze moves subtly past, despite no open windows or vents. Papers flutter ominously.

sensory_feedback.audio: Papers rustle. A low, persistent hum fills the air.
sensory_feedback.visual: Shadows seem to shift at the edges of your vision.

*.message: The cold breeze seems to intensify nearby dangers.

faulty_wiring.message: The cold draft disturbs loose wires, causing them to spark dangerously!

oxygen_tank.message: The sudden temperature drop stresses the tank’s valve—gas starts to hiss!

malfunctioning_ventilator.message: The cold air causes the ventilator to stutter and spark!

faulty_wiring_patch.message: The temperature drop causes condensation on exposed wires—they begin to arc!

icy_presence.description: The breeze circles you like.. menacingly?? Papers flutter, you can feel it.. there's no windows open.. Wtf.

sensory_feedback.audio: A rhythmic creaking, like ice forming on metal. Whispers in a language you don't recognize.
sensory_feedback.visual: Frost patterns spread across surfaces. Your breath comes out in thick clouds.
sensory_feedback.tactile: Your fingers are going numb. Your joints ache with cold.

*.message: Nearby dangers seem to intensify in the presence of this unnatural cold.

unstable_ceiling.message: The extreme cold causes the ceiling materials to contract and crack!

flickering_lights.message: The freezing air causes the electrical system to malfunction violently!

oxygen_tank.message: The violent gust snaps the weakened valve—an oxygen tank rockets free!

*_patch.message: The freezing cold slows your reactions!

elevator_freefall.message: Ice forms on the elevator cables, causing them to snap!

malevolent_gust.description: An invisible, freezing cold moves through the room with unmistakable intent. Death is here, that fuck!

sensory_feedback.audio: A roaring wind that sounds almost like a scream. Objects clatter and fall.
sensory_feedback.visual: The air distorts as if something massive and invisible is moving through it.
sensory_feedback.tactile: The cold is painful, burning your exposed skin.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: Death's presence manifests physically, setting off a deadly chain reaction!

*.message: Death's presence accelerates the danger around you!

wrecking_ball.message: The malevolent wind seems to guide the wrecking ball's trajectory!

banished.description: The unnatural cold dissipates rapidly. The air returns to normal temperature. Death is always around the corner, but bitch just went on a coffee break or something. You feel safer for now.

window: The glass frosts over from the inside, forming a pattern that looks disturbingly like skeletal fingers.
Your breath fogs the window, but so does something else's—from the other side.
The window reflects not just your image, but a shadow behind you that shouldn't exist.
mirror: Your reflection in the mirror appears to shiver before you do, as if feeling a chill you haven't yet noticed.
The mirror fogs at the edges, but the center remains clear—as if something is breathing on it from within.
For just a moment, your reflection's eyes are completely black.
curtains: The curtains billow inward despite all windows being firmly closed.
The curtains sway in a rhythm that almost seems like breathing.
Frost begins to form on the curtain fabric in a spreading pattern.
lights: The lights flicker in a pattern: three quick flashes, pause, three more—almost like a heartbeat.
Every light in the room dims simultaneously, as if something is drawing their energy.
The light bulbs frost over, their glow turning a sickly blue-white.
furniture: The furniture creaks and settles as if the temperature has suddenly dropped.
Frost patterns appear on wooden surfaces, spreading like veins.
Small objects on shelves shift position with no apparent cause.
doors: The door rattles in its frame despite no wind.
The doorknob is cold enough to burn your skin.
You hear the sound of slow, deliberate footsteps approaching from the other side, but when you open it, nothing is there.

first_manifestation: You notice your breath is visible, though the room wasn't cold a moment ago.
second_manifestation: The cold is more intense now. Your fingers are starting to go numb.
third_manifestation: The temperature has dropped so drastically that your teeth are chattering. Something is definitely here with you.
fourth_manifestation: The cold is painful now, seeping into your bones. Death's presence is undeniable.

cold breeze.base_description: An unnatural cold breeze moves through the room, chilling everything in its path.
cold breeze.subtle_chill: An unnatural cold breeze moves through the room, chilling everything in its path. Currently in subtle chill state.
cold breeze.cold_breeze: An unnatural cold breeze moves through the room, chilling everything in its path. Currently in cold breeze state.
cold breeze.icy_presence: An unnatural cold breeze moves through the room, chilling everything in its path. Currently in icy presence state.
cold breeze.malevolent_gust: An unnatural cold breeze moves through the room, chilling everything in its path. Currently in malevolent gust state.
cold breeze.banished: An unnatural cold breeze moves through the room, chilling everything in its path. Currently in banished state.

mri.name: Magnetic Resonance Imager
mri.description: A massive MRI machine, powered down but still dominating in the small room.

spawn_entities.name: MRI machine
spawn_entities.description: A massive MRI machine dominates the center of the room. Its surface is cold and metallic, and the bore is wide enough for a person to slide inside. For now, it is silent and powered down.
spawn_entities.description_powered_down: The MRI machine is silent and dark, looming over the room like a sleeping giant.
spawn_entities.description_field_active: The MRI machine hums ominously, its lights flickering. The magnetic field is active, and you can feel a subtle vibration in the floor.
spawn_entities.description_safely_powered_down: The MRI machine sits quietly, its power cut off after the chaos. The air is filled with the smell of burnt electronics, but the threat has passed.

television: A medical drama shows a scene where a nurse frantically warns, 'No metal near the MRI!' as a stethoscope is pulled from a doctor's neck.
A news segment covers a hospital accident where a staff member tried to force open a magnetically sealed door—only for it to slam shut with terrifying force.

A late-night horror movie shows a character forcing open a heavy metal door —
only for it to snap shut and pin them in place,

the screen cutting away as a wet crunch is heard.
radio: A radio ad for a hospital mentions, 'Our MRI suite is state-of-the-art—just remember to empty your pockets!'
A news bulletin describes a power surge at a local hospital, causing all doors to slam shut on an automated lockdown.
A radio show soundbyte loudly proclaims, 'you're tearing me APART! Lisa.' before the hosts laughter.
window: You notice a faint reflection of yourself in the glass, but your keys appear to be floating beside you.
The window vibrates slightly, as if reacting to a distant, powerful hum.

For a split second, your reflection in the window is bisected by a dark vertical line - slicing straight through you head to toe.
When you blink, it's gone.

ui_popup_event.title: Chain Reaction!
ui_popup_event.message:
The key is pulled from your grasp and clatters against the MRI's casing as its lights flicker to life with an ominous hum.[color=ff0000] Then you hear something slam into the Control Room door from the other side while the employee stairwell exit's metal door seals firmly in place.[/color] The exits are now sealed shut by the magnetic force!

You approach the machine; attempt to[color=ff0000] 'take'[/color] the key again, or try to[color=00ff00] 'force'[/color] a door open!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The magnetic field is immense! MASH to force the door!
qte_context.success_message: You wrench the metal door open enough to slip into the crack, just as your phone slips from your back pocket...
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You can't fight the pull! The door remains sealed shut!

take.description: You cautiously approach the roaring machine to retrieve the key. The magnetic field intensifies, and you hear the screech of metal as loose objects begin to vibrate violently!

powered_down.description: The {object_name} is silent and dark. It seems inactive for now.

field_active_doors_locked.description:
As your fingers touch the key, the door you entered through closes with a deafening [color=FFFF00]SLAM![/color]

The vibration knocks a clipboard in the control room from its hook; it falls onto the workstation, the metal clip sliding across the console's keyboard, and...

[color=ff0000]*BEEP!*[/color]

...shit.

ui_popup_event.title: Doors Sealed!
ui_popup_event.message:
As your fingers touch the key, the door you entered through closes with a deafening [color=FFFF00]SLAM![/color]

The vibration knocks a clipboard in the control room from its hook; it falls onto the workstation, the metal clip sliding across the console's keyboard, and...

[color=ff0000]*BEEP!*[/color]

...shit.

dynamic_projectile_incoming.description: The magnetic field grabs hold of a {object_name} from an adjacent room and violently rips it towards the MRI machine—with you in the crossfire!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: A {object_name} is hurtling toward you! DODGE!
qte_context.success_message: You manage to evade the {object_name} as it smashes into the MRI!
qte_context.failure_message: The {object_name} slams into you!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: A {object_name} is flying at {npc_name}! Save them!
qte_context.success_message: You shove {npc_name} clear just in time!
qte_context.failure_message: The {object_name} brutally crushes {npc_name}!

projectile_stage_1_cart.description:
In front of the active MRI, you're right where Death wants you!

A metal cart tears loose from its position and rockets toward you with lethal speed!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: A metal cart hurtles toward you!
qte_context.success_message: You leap aside as the cart slams into the MRI!
qte_context.failure_message: The cart slams into you! You're pinned against the MRI!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: A metal cart is hurtling toward {npc_name}!! Push them!
qte_context.success_message: You shove {npc_name} aside just before the cart smashes into the MRI!
qte_context.failure_message: You try to reach {npc_name}, but the cart brutally crushes them against the MRI machine!

projectile_stage_1_damaged.description: Bruised and bleeding from the cart impact, you struggle to pull yourself free from the wreckage. The observation window above is cracking...

qte_pause_1.description: You barely avoid the cart, which smashes into the MRI with a shower of sparks. The impact causes the control room's observation window to crack!

projectile_stage_2_window.description: With a deafening CRASH, the observation window shatters! The magnetic field now extends into the control room, seeking heavier prey!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: A heavy oxygen tank is pulled through the window! Duck at the right moment!
qte_context.success_message: You time perfectly, ducking clear as the oxygen tank smashes against the MRI!
qte_context.failure_message: You did..not correctly! The tank clips you hard and you go sprawling!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: An oxygen tank is flying at {npc_name}! Pull them down!
qte_context.success_message: You tackle {npc_name} to the floor as the heavy tank howls over your heads!
qte_context.failure_message: You scream a warning, but the tank violently strikes {npc_name}, sending them sprawling!

projectile_stage_2_damaged.description: You struggle to your feet, gasping for breath. Blood runs from a gash on your forehead. The magnetic field continues to intensify...

final_barrage_wheelchair.description: A metal wheelchair is ripped from the control room and hurtles through the shattered window directly at you!

ui_popup_event.title: Wheelchair Incoming
ui_popup_event.message: A metal wheelchair is ripped from the control room and hurtles through the shattered window directly at you!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: A WHEELCHAIR is flying at you!!
qte_context.success_message: You dive aside as the wheelchair smashes into the MRI machine!
qte_context.failure_message: The wheelchair catches you! Metal spokes tear into your side!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: A WHEELCHAIR is flying at {npc_name}!!
qte_context.success_message: You knock {npc_name} out of the way as the wheelchair smashes into the MRI machine's casing!
qte_context.failure_message: The wheelchair catches {npc_name} in the back, throwing them face first into the machine! Metal spokes bend and break with magnetic force, tearing into {npc_name} as their back is broken and turned into a pincushion (spoke-cushion?)!

final_barrage_wheelchair_damaged.description: You're badly hurt, barely staying conscious. The room spins. A final, massive object is being pulled from the control room...

final_barrage_gurney.description: A gurney from the control room is pulled through the wall, shedding parts as it comes for you!

ui_popup_event.title: Gurney Incoming
ui_popup_event.message: A gurney from the control room is pulled through the wall, shedding parts as it comes for you!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message:
A GURNEY is tumbling through the air!
Are you fucking serious??!
qte_context.success_message: You dive under the tumbling gurney as it crashes into the growing pile of metallic debris!
qte_context.failure_message: The gurney crashes into you! You're buried under the debris!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: A GURNEY is tumbling toward {npc_name}!
qte_context.success_message: You shove {npc_name} flat against the ground just as the tumbling gurney crashes into the pile of metallic debris above them!
qte_context.failure_message: The gurney crashes into {npc_name} before carrying them face-first into the growing pile of metallic debris! They're slowly turned into human hamburger under the twisted wreckage as it morphs and shifts.

critically_injured.description: You lie buried under the wreckage, critically injured. The MRI machine groans and sparks violently above you. If you survive this, it will be a miracle...

mri_cooldown.description: With a final, deafening GROAN and a shower of sparks, the MRI machine shudders to a halt, overloaded by the impacts. The magnetic field collapses. Silence falls, broken only by the crackle of fried electronics.

ui_popup_event.title: MRI Shutdown
ui_popup_event.message:
With a final, deafening GROAN and a shower of sparks, the MRI machine shudders to a halt, overloaded by the impacts.

The magnetic field collapses. Silence falls, broken only by the crackle of fried electronics.

death_by_door_bisection.description:
You force the door open just enough. As you jam into the gap, you feel a violent tug - a split-second of weightlessness in your back pocket... and
*thwip*!
Your phone is ripped away.
It rockets across the room, SMASHING against the touchscreen as you remember earlier - the metal detector, that NFC setting.

*DING!*

'Experimental power levels: APPROVED.'
death_by_door_bisection.death_message:
The air crackles. The magnet power surges.
*WHAM!*
The metal door leaps out of your grasp - driven with mad force into you from groin to face. The cartilage in your nose explodes as you're sandwiched in the frame; held tight in the last embrace you'll ever know, about to have your crust cut off.
Struggling only makes it worse as
bluntly,
forcefully,
aaaagonizingly slowly...

you are more or less bisected, hotdog style, as the door, with a final, juicy *squelch* finally clicks shut.

Way to scar whatever nurse finds you.

spawn_entities.name: ventilator
spawn_entities.description: A hospital ventilator stands beside the bed, its display glowing softly and hoses snaking to the patient.

spawn_entities.name: patient_in_bed
spawn_entities.description: A patient lies unconscious in the bed, chest rising and falling in time with the ventilator.

spawn_entities.name: vital_signs_monitor
spawn_entities.description: A vital signs monitor displays heart rate, oxygen saturation, and other metrics in real-time.

spawn_entities.name: call_button
spawn_entities.description: A small call button hangs from a cord beside the bed, within easy reach of the patient.

spawn_entities.name: bedside_table
spawn_entities.description: A small side table with a drawer. A half-full cup of water sits quietly on the table near the edge.

spawn_entities.name: cup of water
spawn_entities.description: A plastic cup filled with water. It sits quietly on the table near the edge.

spawn_entities.name: iv_stand
spawn_entities.description: A tall metal IV stand with a nearly full saline bag hanging from it. The stand's base is heavy, but a wheel is missing and the top-heavy design makes it unstable.

spawn_entities.name: power strip
spawn_entities.description: The ventilator and monitors are plugged into this strip on the floor. It buzzes faintly.

television: A daytime soap opera shows a dramatic scene where a character on life support flatlines. The monitor emits a long, piercing BEEP before the screen cuts to static.
A commercial for 'Breathe-EZ' allergy medication shows a field of flowers, but the audio is a distorted, rhythmic hissing sound, like a failing respirator.
A home improvement show demonstrates electrical wiring. The host says, '...and if you cross these wires, you'll get a real light show!' as a shower of sparks erupts from the panel.
radio: A news report mentions a city-wide power surge, causing 'unexpected electrical failures in critical equipment'.
A slow, rhythmic song plays, but it's interrupted by bursts of static that sound like a stuttering breath.

examine.message:
The patient's skin is pallid, almost translucent, under the harsh ICU lights. His chest rises and falls in a rhythm not his own, dictated by the machine beside him.

A metal dog tag rests on his collarbone: 'WAINWRIGHT, CORBIN - O NEG'.

The ventilator hums quietly, its rhythm steady. But as you lean in to examine it more closely, a new, sharp cracking sound comes from within its casing.
The rhythm falters for a moment before catching itself. You may have made things worse.

use.message: With a Mechanic's precision, you unscrew the maintenance panel and sever the main power coupling before the surge can build.
You jam the screwdriver into the panel, but you hit a live wire! Sparks erupt in your face!

call_button.base_description: A small call button hangs from a cord beside the bed, within easy reach of the patient.
call_button.call_button_falls: The call button has fallen, and the cup of water is now a puddle on the floor beside the sparking outlet.
call_button.miraculous_save: The call button has fallen, and the cup of water is now a puddle on the floor beside the sparking outlet.
call_button.electrical_death: The call button has fallen, and the cup of water is now a puddle on the floor beside the sparking outlet.
call_button.death_by_impalement: The call button has fallen, and the cup of water is now a puddle on the floor beside the sparking outlet.
call_button.death_by_deintubation: The call button has fallen, and the cup of water is now a puddle on the floor beside the sparking outlet.

bedside_table.base_description: A small side table with a drawer. A half-full cup of water sits precariously near the edge.
bedside_table.call_button_falls: The cup of water has been knocked over by the falling call button, leaving a puddle on the floor beside the sparking outlet.
bedside_table.miraculous_save: The cup of water has been knocked over by the falling call button, leaving a puddle on the floor beside the sparking outlet.
bedside_table.electrical_death: The cup of water has been knocked over by the falling call button, leaving a puddle on the floor beside the sparking outlet.
bedside_table.death_by_impalement: The cup of water has been knocked over by the falling call button, leaving a puddle on the floor beside the sparking outlet.
bedside_table.death_by_deintubation: The cup of water has been knocked over by the falling call button, leaving a puddle on the floor beside the sparking outlet.

iv_stand.base_description: A tall metal IV stand with a nearly full saline bag hanging from it. The stand's base is heavy -and a wheel is missing- but the top-heavy design makes it even more unstable.
iv_stand.cord_whips_back: The IV stand teeters precariously, about to topple toward Corbin's face.
iv_stand.death_by_impalement: The IV stand protrudes grotesquely from Corbin's eye socket, blood coating its metal frame.
iv_stand.miraculous_save: The IV stand stands upright - someone should call an equipment tech to fix that.
iv_stand.electrical_death: The IV stand lies toppled beside the bed, forgotten in the aftermath of the failed rescue.
iv_stand.death_by_deintubation: The IV stand lies toppled beside the bed, forgotten in the aftermath of the failed rescue.

power_cord.base_description: The ventilator's thick power cord runs along the wall to an outlet near the patient's head.
power_cord.call_button_falls: The power cord is unplugged, sparks still arcing from the wet outlet.
power_cord.electrical_death: The power cord is charred black, melted into the outlet.
power_cord.miraculous_save: The power cord is unplugged and safely away from the wet outlet. The room feels calm.
power_cord.death_by_impalement: The power cord is unplugged, forgotten in the chaos as the IV stand protrudes from Corbin's eye.
power_cord.death_by_deintubation: The power cord is unplugged, but blood pools near the outlet as the tube lies discarded.

vital_signs_monitor.base_description: A vital signs monitor displays the patient's heart rate, oxygen saturation, and other critical metrics in real-time.
vital_signs_monitor.call_button_falls: The monitor flickers as sparks arc from the wet outlet. Readings jump erratically.
vital_signs_monitor.electrical_death: The monitor is dark, its screen cracked. A flatline is frozen on the display.
vital_signs_monitor.deintubation_crisis_qte: The monitor alarms blare as the breathing tube is pulled taut.
vital_signs_monitor.miraculous_save: The monitor shows stable vitals. Corbin is breathing on his own.
vital_signs_monitor.death_by_impalement: The monitor emits a long, piercing tone as Corbin is impaled.
vital_signs_monitor.death_by_deintubation: The monitor alarms sound briefly, then fade to silence as the tube is violently removed.

patient_in_bed.base_description: The patient in bed has been through a LOT. There are signs of struggle and distress, burns... He's defintely in the right place.
patient_in_bed.stable_rhythm: Corbin's chest rises and falls in mechanical precision, the ventilator doing its work.
patient_in_bed.miraculous_save: Corbin Wainwright lies in bed, breathing on his own. His eyes are open, and a faint smile plays at the corners of his mouth. The journal he gave you rests nearby.
patient_in_bed.electrical_death: Corbin's body lies motionless in the bed. The ventilator is dark, and the monitors display a flatline. The air is thick with the smell of burnt plastic.
patient_in_bed.death_by_impalement: Corbin's body is still, the IV stand protruding grotesquely from his eye socket. Blood stains the pillow and sheets.
patient_in_bed.death_by_deintubation: Corbin's throat is torn open, blood pooling on the bed. The breathing tube lies discarded, and the ventilator is silent.

stable_rhythm.description:
The rhythmic hiss of the ventilator is the only sound, a fragile barrier against the room's oppressive silence.
Corbin lies unconscious, his chest rising and falling in mechanical precision.

call_button_falls.description:
As if disturbed by your examination, the call button slips from its precarious position on the bed rail.

It swings down and KNOCKS the cup of water from the bedside table! Water splashes across the wall outlet where the ventilator is plugged in. Sparks begin to arc from the wet outlet!

electrical_hazard_qte.description:
The wet outlet is sparking dangerously! The ventilator could short out at any moment, killing Corbin!

You need to unplug it NOW!

consequences.message: Sparks begin to arc from the wet outlet!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: SPARKING OUTLET! Mash keys to yank the power cord!
qte_context.success_message: You grab the cord and yank it from the sparking outlet just in time! But the sudden release sends you stumbling backward...
qte_context.failure_message: You're too slow! The outlet shorts out with a brilliant flash, and the ventilator dies with a pathetic wheeze.
qte_context.timeout_message: The sparks intensify! You hesitate too long!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: {npc_name} lunges for the cord but is stepping into the puddle! Mash to yank them back!
qte_context.success_message: You yank {npc_name} backward by their collar just as the outlet explodes in a shower of sparks! The sudden force sends you both stumbling...
qte_context.failure_message: {npc_name} steps into the puddle and grabs the cord. The current instantly locks their muscles, cooking them from the inside out before the power trips and the ventilator dies.
qte_context.timeout_message: You hesitate! {npc_name} steps into the electrified water!

cord_whips_back.description:
Your forceful yank sends the heavy power cord whipping back through the air like a rubber band.
It strikes the off-balance IV stand with a metallic
*CLANG!*

The top-heavy pole begins to topple toward Corbin's face!

iv_stand_toppling_qte.description:
The IV stand is falling toward Corbin!

The spiral metal tip at the top is aimed directly at his eye socket!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: IV STAND FALLING! Type 'catch stand' to save him!
qte_context.success_message:
Pure instinct takes over! You lunge forward and shove the heavy stand as it's mere inches from Corbin's face.

The heavy stand topples the other way, falling onto the tubing for Corbin's breathing tube, pulling it taut!
qte_context.failure_message: You're not fast enough! The metal tip punches through Corbin's eye socket with a wet pop and crunch.
qte_context.timeout_message:
You freeze, unable to react!
This isn't going to end well.

..for Corbin.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: IV STAND FALLING AT {npc_name}! Type 'push' to save them!
qte_context.success_message: You violently shove {npc_name} out of the way! The heavy stand crashes onto the bed instead, pulling Corbin's breathing tube taut!
qte_context.failure_message: The heavy metal tip of the IV stand punches straight through {npc_name}'s skull. They drop to the floor like a stone.
qte_context.timeout_message: You freeze! The IV stand comes crashing down on {npc_name}!

bed_controls_hit.description:
Your heroic save worked, but at a cost!
The impact *WHACKS* the bed's electronic control panel hard, and sparks fly from the damaged console.

With a mechanical whirring sound, the bed's head section begins to rise automatically! This will pull the breathing tube even further and could deintubate Corbin violently!

deintubation_crisis_qte.description:
The bed is rising! Corbin's breathing tube is being pulled taut!
If it's yanked out incorrectly, the metal connector will tear his throat open!

You need to support his head and ease the tube out safely!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message:
TUBE PULLING TAUT! Tap to the green zone to ease it out safely!
HURRY TF UP!!
qte_context.success_message:
With desperate precision, you support Corbin's head and guide the tube out safely as the bed rises. He gasps, taking his first unassisted breath in days.
His eyes flutter open, filled with gratitude.
qte_context.failure_message:
You can't keep up with the bed's movement!

The tube is yanked out violently, the metal connector tearing through throat tissue. Blood fountains from the wound.
qte_context.timeout_message:
The bed continues rising inexorably!

The tube tears free with a wet, horrible sound.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: GEARS CAUGHT {npc_name}! Tap to green zone to free them AND save Corbin!
qte_context.success_message: You violently tear {npc_name} free from the scissoring gears, then grab Corbin's tube, easing it out safely just as the bed locks into place!
qte_context.failure_message: The mechanical bed mercilessly crushes {npc_name}'s torso against the frame, violently ripping Corbin's tube out in the process. A double tragedy in an instant.
qte_context.timeout_message: The bed continues rising! {npc_name} is crushed and Corbin's throat is torn open!

miraculous_save.description:
Against all odds, you've saved Corbin Wainwright from even more of Death's elaborate traps!
He breathes on his own now, weak but alive to cheat Death another day.

With trembling hands, he reaches under his pillow and pulls out a leather journal, pressing it into your hands. His eyes convey what his voice cannot yet manage: gratitude, and a warning about what's to come.

electrical_death.description:
The outlet explodes in a shower of sparks! The ventilator dies instantly... Corbin takes considerably longer.

You feel a strange, cold rush as his vitals flatline. Did you just get his time left?

death_by_impalement.description:
The IV stand completes its deadly arc. The spiral metal tip punches through the skull with a sickening crunch, penetrating deep into the brain.

The body convulses once, then goes still. Your attempt to help led directly to this gruesome end.

death_by_deintubation.description:
The breathing tube is ripped from Corbin's throat with brutal force. The metal connector tears through delicate tissue, opening his trachea like a second mouth.

Blood pours from the wound as he drowns in his own blood, his eyes wide with betrayal. Your heroic efforts only delayed and worsened his death.

on_state_entry_consequences.cause: Massive throat trauma from mechanical bed

spawn_entities.name: revolving door
spawn_entities.description:
The revolving door's frame is solid steel—heavy and industrial.
Scorch marks near the top suggest a past electrical issue.

spawn_entities.name: hospital sign
spawn_entities.first_examine_description:
The 'L' in 'Hospital' is flickering weakly. As you look up, the motion blur makes it appear as if the sign were moving - like it were coming down at you.
A cold breeze brushes past you, and the sensation passes.
spawn_entities.description: A massive sign for 'Hope River Hospital' hangs precariously from the facade above the exit. It creaks softly in the wind.

spawn_entities.name: ambulance
spawn_entities.first_examine_description:
As you glance toward the street, you see a blur of flashing lights and motion — a speeding ambulance bearing down on you!
You blink, and the illusion vanishes.
spawn_entities.description: An ambulance is parked near the loading dock, its engine silent. It seems ready for a call that will never come.

ui_popup_event.title: Trapped!
ui_popup_event.message:
You step into the revolving door and push.
Suddenly, with a gut-wrenching screech, it jams solid, trapping you inside!

revolving door.base_description:
The revolving door's frame is solid steel—heavy and industrial.
Scorch marks near the top suggest a past electrical issue.
revolving door.first_examine_description: As you study the revolving door, you notice faint grooves and scratches on the metal frame—almost as if something had been caught and dragged around inside. For a moment, you imagine the panels spinning far faster than they should, slicing through anything in their path.

hospital sign.base_description: A massive sign for 'Hope River Hospital' hangs precariously from the facade above the exit. It creaks softly in the wind.
hospital sign.first_examine_description:
The 'L' in 'Hospital' is flickering weakly. As you look up, the motion blur makes it appear as if the sign were moving - like it were coming down at you.
A cold breeze brushes past you, and the sensation passes.

ambulance.first_examine_description:
As you glance toward the street, you see a blur of flashing lights and motion — a speeding ambulance bearing down on you!
You blink, and the illusion vanishes.
ambulance.base_description: An ambulance is parked near the loading dock, its engine silent. It seems ready for a call that will never come.

off.description: The revolving door appears to be functioning normally.

door_jammed_trapped.description:
You push your way into the revolving door.

It rotates once, then with a gut-wrenching SCREECH of tortured metal, it jams solid, trapping you inside!

door_force_qte.description:
You are trapped inside the jammed revolving door! The glass panel ahead is thick and the frame is unyielding, but you hear a grinding noise as the panels behind you try to continue forward.
You have to force your way out!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: TRAPPED! MASH to force the door open!
qte_context.success_message: With a final, desperate shove and a groan of metal, the door gives way and you stumble out onto the pavement!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input:
You can't budge it! The mechanism begins to grind as the door panel ahead of you breaks free from the base and sticks firmly in place!
The compartment is shrinking around you as the rest of the door frame continues to rotate...

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: {npc_name} is trapped in the shrinking compartment ahead! MASH to brace the frame!
qte_context.success_message: You brace the groaning metal with your legs! {npc_name} slips through the gap just before you force your way out after them!
qte_context.failure_message: You can't hold the frame! {npc_name} screams as the metal compresses, crushing them against the glass until it shatters, spilling you out onto the pavement covered in their blood.

falling_sign_qte.description:
The vibration from your forceful escape travels up the building's facade. High above, you hear a sickening series of SNAPS.

The massive hospital sign, its supports already weakened by the MRI incident, breaks free and plummets directly toward you!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE SIGN IS FALLING! Where do you go?! Type 'DIVE' (into street), 'BACK' (toward door), or 'SIDESTEP'!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You hesitate, a fatal mistake. The sign crushes you against the pavement.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE SIGN IS FALLING ON {npc_name}! Shove them 'DIVE' (street), 'BACK' (door), or 'SIDESTEP'!
qte_context.success_message: You violently shove {npc_name} out of the kill zone just in time!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You hesitate, and the massive sign obliterates {npc_name} right in front of you. The shockwave and flying debris knock you backward toward the doors!

dodge_success_dive.description:
You dive headlong into the street as the sign obliterates the sidewalk behind you.
You look up when you hear the deafening blare of a horn and the screech of tires as an ambulance, speeding toward the ER, bears down on you!

dodge_success_back.description:
The sign crashes down where you just were and an ambulance, barreling towards the ER, drives over the spot you would have landed on if you jumped forward!
The impact and metal debris sends a violent shudder through the revolving door and shatters the glass panels. The motor shrieks and it begins to spin at an impossible speed, turning the door into a human-sized blender you're about to fall into!

ambulance_qte.description: The ambulance is seconds from impact!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: AMBULANCE! Type 'roll' to get out of the way!
qte_context.success_message: You roll out of the way just as the ambulance screams past, its tires missing your head by inches!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: There's no time. The front grille of the ambulance is the last thing you see.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: AMBULANCE BEARING DOWN! Type 'tackle' to save {npc_name}!
qte_context.success_message: You tackle {npc_name} into the gutter just as the ambulance screams past, its tires missing you both by inches!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: {npc_name} freezes in the headlights like a deer. The ambulance grille hits them with a sickening crunch, throwing their mangled body down the street.

spinning_blades_qte.description: The revolving door has become a spinning blender of glass and steel!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: BLENDER DOOR! GET CLEAR FAST!
qte_context.success_message: You spiral your body frantically, throwing yourself away from the entrance as a piece of the door breaks off and flies past you!
qte_context.failure_message:
You adjust your balance too slowly and the spinning frame clips your knee.

That hurt, but nothing compared to what happens next.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: BLENDER DOOR! {npc_name} is falling! Drag a spiral to sling them away!
qte_context.success_message: You grab {npc_name}'s arm and use your momentum to spiral them away from the deadly spinning glass!
qte_context.failure_message: You lose your grip. {npc_name} falls backward into the spinning door. The gnarled metal claws pull them into the makeshift blender, shredding them in an instant.

dodge_success_sidestep.description:
You sidestep along the building wall; the sign crashes down exactly where you were just standing, as an ambulance speeding through swerves over the spot you would have landed if you jumped forward!

Mangled bits of the giant 'L' catch the lip of the revolving door. The motor shrieks and it begins to spin at an impossible speed, turning the door into a human-sized blender!

Suddenly, the spinning blades catch the 'L' and [color=00ff00]*LAUNCHES*[/color] a giant chunk of metal straight at you!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: FLYING DEBRIS! DODGE THE 'L'!
qte_context.success_message: You drop to the pavement as the heavy metal 'L' decapitates a parking meter behind you!
qte_context.failure_message: You don't move fast enough. The flying metal 'L' catches you right in the neck.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: FLYING DEBRIS AIMED AT {npc_name}! GET THEM DOWN!
qte_context.success_message: You tackle {npc_name} to the pavement! The heavy metal 'L' shrieks over your heads and decapitates a parking meter!
qte_context.failure_message: You reach for {npc_name}, but you're a second too late. The heavy metal 'L' shears through their neck. Their head drops onto the pavement with a sickening thud.

death_by_flying_l.description: Your body collapses to the pavement as your severed head rolls into the gutter.
death_by_flying_l.death_message: Mostly decapitated by flying hospital sign debris.

safe_exit_ending.description:
You lie on the pavement, chest heaving.

The door is grinding to a halt, the ambulance is gone, and the heavy metal 'L' is deeply embedded in the concrete a few feet away.

You are shaken as hell, but alive.

narrow_escape_ending.description:
You scramble away from the horrifyingly fast revolving door as it continues to spin itself into a frenzy.

One door panel jams and breaks loose from the base as the remaining three panels make one final grinding revolution, slamming into it one at a time with a 'WHAM!-WHAM!-WHAM!' like a book made of metal and glass coming to a violent close.

With an address, a key, and a purpose, you are safe. For now.

blast_wave_ending.description: [color=BC13FE]You lie panting on the asphalt, the smell of diesel fumes filling your lungs. You survived. The sign is rubble, the door is silent, and you are alive. You've made it out.[/color]

death_by_door_crush.description:
You can't force the door. The mechanism grinds and whirs, grinding inexorably as the compartment you are in begins to compress; the door behind you coming closer as the door in front of you breaks from the base and refuses to budge.

The glass cracks as the panels slowly compress your body, then shatters outward as the metal frame crushes you.
death_by_door_crush.death_message: Smashing, baby! Crushed to death in a revolving door after it jams and malfunctions.

death_by_sign_crush.description: Your hesitation is fatal. The massive sign crashes down with the force of a guillotine, ending your story in a final, brutal impact.
death_by_sign_crush.death_message: Crushed by the falling hospital sign.

death_by_ambulance.description: There's no time to escape. Your successful dodge from one fate only served to deliver you directly to another. The front grille of the ambulance is the last thing you ever see - lucky for you, you already know where the morgue is.
death_by_ambulance.death_message: Struck and killed by a speeding ambulance after dodging a falling sign.

death_by_blades.description:
Your body contorts even further sideways, the jagged door frame catching your elbow-
then hip-
then shoulder-
twisting you off-balance.

You topple sideways and the door sinks its gnarled metal claws into you as you're finally pulled into the makeshift blender.
death_by_blades.death_message: Shredded by a haywire revolving door after dodging a falling sign.

spawn_entities.name: oxygen tank
spawn_entities.description: A pressurized oxygen tank stands upright, secured—or so it seems. The valve assembly rattles faintly.

unstable_shelf.message: The collapsing shelf slams a heavy textbook directly into the oxygen tank's valve!

precarious_object.message: The falling object clips the oxygen tank, knocking it off balance!

television: A news segment shows footage of a house fire caused by an exploding oxygen tank.
A medical drama features a tense scene where a nurse warns, 'If that tank tips over, it could become a missile!'
A commercial for home oxygen equipment ends with a disclaimer about safe storage and handling.
radio: A radio announcer mentions a recent recall of faulty oxygen tank valves.
A public service announcement warns: 'Never store oxygen tanks near heat or open flame.'
window: Condensation forms on the window, and you notice a faint hissing sound from somewhere nearby.
A brief reflection in the window shows an oxygen tank tipping over behind you - and disappears when you blink.
The glass vibrates slightly, as if reacting to a sudden change in air pressure.

examine.message: A pressurized oxygen tank stands upright, secured—or so it seems. The valve assembly rattles faintly.
The tank is spent—just an empty steel cylinder now.

use.message: You jostle the tank. The valve starts to hiss ominously...
The tank is empty. There's nothing left to use.

sealed.description: A pressurized oxygen tank stands upright, secured—or so it seems.

jostled.description: Something disturbed the tank. It suddenly drops and rattles against the floor, rolling as if deciding where to stop.

leaking.description: A high-pressure hiss escapes the valve as it clips against the floor. The sound is deafening, and the air fills with a high-pressure hiss of escaping oxygen.

projectile_jet.description:
The valve shears—an icy jet blasts sideways! The tank rockets across the room like a torpedo!
LOOK OUT!!

qte_context.description: Player must repeat a sequence of inputs shown to them.
qte_context.success_message: You throw yourself aside as the steel cylinder howls past!
qte_context.failure_message: You hesitate—the tank slams into you with bone-shattering force!

qte_context.description: {npc_name} is frozen in the path of the tank! It's headed straight for their face!
qte_context.success_message: You tackle {npc_name} to the floor just as the heavy cylinder howls past their head!
qte_context.failure_message:
You lunge for {npc_name}, but you're too slow. Adrenaline dilates time so you can see the inevitable in slow motion-
-the tank *slams* into their face with bone-shattering force, spraying blood and chunks of ..cartilage? everywhere.
You'd get a pulse but the new shape of their head is indicator enough that they're dead as fuck.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.description: The tank punches into a wall, rupturing a hidden gas line—hissing fills the room!
triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The tank punches into a wall, rupturing a hidden gas line—hissing fills the room!

empty.description: The cylinder spins to a halt—pressure spent. The room smells faintly of oxygen and frost.

death_by_tank_impact.description: The heavy cylinder smashes into your face with lethal force. The last thing you see is the back of your own skull.
death_by_tank_impact.death_message: Killed by a rocketting oxygen tank.

gas_leak.name: Gas Leak
object_name_options: a ruptured gas line in the wall
a cracked section of the wall hissing faintly

examine.message: You investigate the {object_name}. The smell of gas intensifies, and you hear a faint hiss.

use.message_success: You manage to tighten the {object_name}, and the hissing stops. The smell of gas lessens.
use.message_failure: The wrench slips! The valve is too corroded to turn properly.

use.message_success: You wrap duct tape around the leak. It's a temporary fix, but the hissing stops.
use.message_failure: The tape won't stick properly to the gas-slicked surface!

use.message_success: You flick the lighter near the {object_name}. The gas ignites with a terrifying WHOOSH!
use.message_failure: You try to ignite the gas, but the lighter sputters out. The leak continues.

use.message: You tighten the corroded valve with expert precision. The hissing stops.
You fumble with the wrench, but you don't know enough about pressure systems to stop the leak safely.

force.message: You attempt to force the valve, but it snaps! Gas begins pouring out rapidly!

wall_damage.message: A violent impact or explosion has damaged the wall! You hear a new hiss as gas escapes from fractured piping within.

robo_vacuum.message: The sparks from the erratic robot ignite the gas!

spreading_fire.message: The fire reaches the gas leak with catastrophic results!

wall_collapse.message: The collapsing wall ruptures a hidden gas line, starting a new leak!

faint_smell.description: There's a faint, sweet smell of gas near the {object_name} on the {support_object}.

hissing_leak.description: A steady hiss comes from the {object_name} on the {support_object}, and the smell of gas is stronger.

entry_actions.message_in_target: A faint chemical smell drifts through the vent above you.

damaged_wall.description: A section of wall is cracked and leaking gas! The hiss is noticeable and the air smells strongly of mercaptan.

entry_actions.message_in_target: A faint chemical smell drifts through the vent above you.

moderate_leak.description: Gas hisses loudly from the {object_name} on the {support_object}. The air shimmers slightly with vapors.

heavy_leak.description: The smell of gas from the {object_name} on the {support_object} is overpowering. The air feels thick and dangerous.

on_state_entry_special_action.message_in_target: The sickly sweet smell of gas creeps in from the adjacent room.

critical_accumulation.description: Gas pours from the {object_name} on the {support_object} in a visible stream. The air is dangerously saturated.

on_state_entry_special_action.message_in_target: Thick gas begins pouring out of the ventilation shafts!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: {npc_name} panics and pulls out a flashlight! MASH to slap it out of their hand before they spark the gas!
qte_context.success_message: You slap the flashlight out of {npc_name}'s hand before they can click the button. 'NO SPARKS!' you hiss.
qte_context.failure_message: {npc_name} clicks the flashlight on. The tiny electrical spark is all it takes to ignite the saturated air.
qte_context.timeout_message: {npc_name} clicks the flashlight on. The tiny electrical spark is all it takes.

imminent_explosion.description: The {object_name} on the {support_object} screams with escaping gas. The air is a deadly cocktail waiting for ignition.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The gas is about to ignite! MASH to dive out of the room!
qte_context.success_message: You dive through the doorway just as the room erupts behind you!
qte_context.failure_message: You're too slow! The explosion catches you!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: {npc_name} collapses, choking on the thick gas! MASH to drag them out!
qte_context.success_message: You heave {npc_name} to their feet and dive through the doorway just as the room erupts in a massive fireball!
qte_context.failure_message: They're too heavy! The gas ignites, and the concussive blast throws you into the hallway. You look back just in time to see {npc_name} incinerated in the epicenter.

ruptured_pipe.description: The {object_name} on the {support_object} is completely ruptured, spewing gas into the air!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The pressurized pipe bursts! A heavy metal valve flies at {npc_name}! MASH to tackle them!
qte_context.success_message: You tackle {npc_name} to the floor! The metal valve flies over your heads and embeds itself deep into the wall!
qte_context.failure_message: The heavy metal valve blows off the pipe and strikes {npc_name} squarely in the temple, instantly crushing their skull before the gas even has a chance to ignite.
qte_context.timeout_message: The pipe explodes! {npc_name} is struck in the head by the flying metal valve!

ignited.description: The leaking gas from the {object_name} on the {support_object} ignites with a terrifying WHOOSH!
ignited.death_message: The room erupts in a fireball as the gas ignites! You're instantly incinerated.

on_state_entry_special_action.message_in_target: A chemical smell seeps from the pipes in the wall.

accepts_fate_explosion.description:
You stand still, closing your eyes as the gas fills the room. You accept your fate - choosing to end this game on your own terms.

The explosion comes swiftly, and everything fades to black.
accepts_fate_explosion.death_message: Death thinks it has won, but you've just told yourself it's time.

explosive_ignition.description: The accumulated gas explodes in a devastating fireball that rocks the entire building!
explosive_ignition.death_message: The gas explosion tears through the room with the force of a bomb! You're vaporized instantly.

on_state_entry_special_action.message_in_target: A blast of smoke and heat erupts from the vents!

post_explosion_safe.description: The area where the {object_name} was located is now a blackened, destroyed mess.

npc_dies_in_blast.description: The explosion obliterates the room. You lie in the hallway, ears ringing, coughing up blood and smoke. {npc_name} is gone. There's nothing left but fire and the stench of burnt hair.

temporarily_patched.description: The {object_name} on the {support_object} is wrapped in duct tape, temporarily stopping the leak.

patch_failing.description: The duct tape on the {object_name} is starting to peel away. Gas begins to seep out again.

sealed_leak.description: The {object_name} on the {support_object} appears to be properly sealed. The smell of gas is fading.

new_leak_developing.description: Despite your repairs, a new leak has developed in the {object_name} on the {support_object}.

gas_leak.removal_message: The {object_name} has been permanently sealed or destroyed.

robo_vacuum.name: Robo-Vacuum
ambient_messages: The vacuum whirs in the corner, sounding like a little revving engine.
You hear a mechanical beep that sounds almost aggressive.
The vacuum bumps repeatedly against the wall: *thud... thud...*

spawn_entities.name: robot vacuum
spawn_entities.description: A small, disc-shaped robot vacuum sits on its charging dock, its indicator light blinking.

examine.message: The robot vacuum sits quietly on its charging dock. The battery light pulses slowly.
The robot vacuum emits sparks and moves erratically.

kick.message: You kick the vacuum off its dock! It beeps furiously and begins to spin!
You kick the {object_name}! It becomes aggressive!

use.message: You press the 'Clean' button. The vacuum chirps and rolls off the dock.

take.message: As you try to pick up the {object_name}, it spins its brushes, trying to catch your fingers!

docked.description: A {object_name} sits quietly on its charging dock.

patrolling.description: The {object_name} hums as it navigates the area.

water_puddle.message: Sparks fly as the vacuum sucks up the water! It begins to spin erratically!

sparking_malfunction.description: The vacuum is short-circuiting, throwing showers of sparks in every direction!

gas_leak.message: The sparking vacuum rolls directly into the gas leak! A massive spark jumps from its chassis...

damaged_aggressive.description: Your kick has damaged the {object_name}! Now it's angry, moving aggressively with sparks flying!

berserker_mode.description: The {object_name} is in berserker mode, moving with predatory intent!

overheating_shutdown_qte.description: The {object_name} is overheating! It's about to shut down or explode!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE VACUUM IS OVERHEATING! Mash keys to cool it down or take cover!
qte_context.success_message: You manage to cool it down just in time!
qte_context.failure_message: It explodes in a shower of sparks! You are hit by flying debris!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The sparking vacuum locks onto {npc_name} like a homing bomb! MASH to stomp it!
qte_context.success_message: You furiously stomp the vacuum into pieces just before it reaches {npc_name}!
qte_context.failure_message: The vacuum reaches {npc_name} and detonates with surprising force! Shrapnel and lithium battery acid shred them instantly.

defensive_spin_qte.description: The {object_name} spins its brushes at high speed, trying to defend itself!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The vacuum spins up! Type 'grab' to snatch it safely!
qte_context.success_message: You grab the vacuum and power it down.
qte_context.failure_message: The spinning brush whacks your hand painfully!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The spinning vacuum charges {npc_name}! Type 'kick' to punt it away!
qte_context.success_message: You punt the vacuum away from {npc_name}! It crashes into a wall, sparking and thoroughly pissed off.
qte_context.failure_message: The vacuum tangles in {npc_name}'s legs, sweeping them off their feet. They fall hard, cracking their skull sickeningly against the sharp corner of nearby furniture.

explosive_destruction.death_message: Killed by a robot vacuum explosion.

move.message: Are you insane?! The elevator is actively failing! The buttons aren't going to save you!
You press the floor button. The elevator lurches into motion.

idle.description: The elevator hums quietly at rest.

moving.description: The elevator is moving between floors.

shaking.description: The elevator lurches violently! Cables groan above!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: ELEVATOR JERK! Type 'brace'!
qte_context.success_message: You brace and keep your footing! The elevator stabilizes.
qte_context.failure_message: You smash against the wall! The cables snap!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: PLUNGING! Mash keys to brace yourself!
qte_context.success_message: You smash the emergency stop! The brakes scream as they bite!
qte_context.failure_message: The impact is catastrophic.

hard_landing_survival.description: The car slams into the bottom of the shaft! Bruised and broken, you pry the doors open and drag yourself out into the basement lobby.

impact.description:
The car obliterates at the bottom of the shaft.

You just happened to be along for the ride.

ui_popup_event.title: You done done it now!
ui_popup_event.message:
The wind howls through the steel. Something feels off.

Death is about to make a move!

dormant.description: The massive iron sphere hangs motionless from the crane's cable, suspended against the McKinley skyline.

swinging_for_qte.description: With a terrifying shriek of unspooling cable, the massive wrecking ball drops and swings in a deadly pendulum arc directly toward the scaffolding!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: A WRECKING BALL IS HURTLING TOWARDS YOU! 'DODGE' TO SIDESTEP OR 'DIVE' FOR A DESPERATE LEAP!
qte_context.success_message: You lunge aside, the wind from the passing wrecking ball tearing at your clothes! It smashes through the guardrail where you were standing, sending steel bolts flying...
qte_context.alternative_success_message: With a desperate, sprawling dive, you hit the metal grating hard as the wrecking ball screams through the space your head occupied moments before! It obliterates the outer scaffold with a deafening CRUNCH.
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You freeze for a fraction of a second too long. The iron sphere connects with a sickening thud, turning you into a red mist against the high-rise framework.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: WRECKING BALL HURTLING AT THE TARGET! Type 'SHOVE', 'TACKLE', or 'PULL' them!
qte_context.success_message: You aggressively force them out of the kill zone! The massive iron ball screams past, obliterating the outer scaffolding!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You fail to move them in time. The wrecking ball strikes them square in the chest, crushing them instantly and taking the scaffolding with them.

return_swing_warning.description: The massive iron ball, having demolished the outer platform, reaches the apex of its swing. The crane cable groans as it reverses direction, racing back towards you with terrifying speed!

return_swing_qte.description: The wrecking ball hurtles back toward you with unstoppable momentum!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE BALL IS SWINGING BACK! Choose 'dodge' to evade!
qte_context.success_message: You scramble backwards along the catwalk as the wrecking ball whooshes past! The impact severely damages the main structural support...
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You can't escape the return arc. The heavy iron catches you, throwing you off the platform into the void.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE BALL IS SWINGING BACK TOWARD THEM! Choose 'dodge' to yank them away!
qte_context.success_message: You yank them backwards as the wrecking ball whooshes past, missing them by inches! The impact severely damages the main structural support...
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: They trip on a rivet. The massive iron ball catches them on the return arc, launching their broken body off the edge of the high-rise.

falling_facade_qte.description: You survived the ball, but the impacts have shattered the scaffolding's structural integrity. A heavy steel I-beam, torn loose from the floor above, plummets down directly towards you!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: STEEL BEAM FALLING! Choose 'jump' to evade!
qte_context.success_message: You leap back as the steel beam impales the metal grating where you stood. The area is finally silent.
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You look up just in time to see the jagged end of the beam fill your vision.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: BEAM FALLING ON TARGET! Choose 'jump' to shove them clear!
qte_context.success_message: You shove them clear just as the heavy I-beam impales the grating where they stood!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You try to reach them, but the jagged piece of steel plummets down, pinning them to the grating. The blood drips down to the floor below.

miraculous_escape_positioning.description: Your desperate dive took you further along the catwalk, giving you a precious extra second. As the wrecking ball completes its return swing, you hear a high-pitched SCREECH of tortured metal from the crane itself!

cable_snap_qte.description: The main cable holding the ball begins to smoke and unravel with a series of sharp, whip-like cracks! The entire wrecking ball is about to plummet down onto the scaffold!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE CABLE IS BREAKING! MASH to sprint away before the ball falls!
qte_context.success_message: You sprint away just as the cable snaps completely! The wrecking ball crashes through the scaffold behind you with earth-shaking force. You've escaped.
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You hesitate, misjudging the danger. The collapsing platform takes you with it.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE CABLE IS BREAKING! Target is frozen! MASH to drag them away!
qte_context.success_message: You haul them away by their collar just as the cable snaps! The wrecking ball crashes through the floor where they were standing.
qte_context.failure_message: They're dead weight! You dive clear just as the cable snaps, but the massive ball plummets down, dragging them into the abyss.

impact_floor_break.description: Your combined weight is too much for the unsupported grating! With a sharp crack, the scaffolding gives way and you stumble into the space beneath. As you look up, dazed, you see the massive wrecking ball swing silently through the space you just occupied... directly into the support struts you're holding onto.
impact_floor_break.death_message: The collapsing platform didn't kill you, but it put you right in Death's path. The long fall finishes the job.

level_complete_survival.description: You stand panting, adrenaline coursing through you, amid the wreckage of Scaffold Level B. The wind howls over the jagged steel edge. You're alive... and the city waits below.

obliterated_by_first_swing.description: Your hesitation was fatal. The world dissolves into a symphony of crushing force and blinding pain.
obliterated_by_first_swing.death_message: Obliterated by the initial swing of the wrecking ball.

impact_return_swing_death.description: The return swing was faster, more brutal. You couldn't react in time.
impact_return_swing_death.death_message: You cheated death for a second, but it always comes back around. The returning wrecking ball knocks you off the scaffolding.

death_by_falling_debris.description: After all that, it wasn't the ball that got you. A jagged I-beam, shaken loose by the chaos, plummets down and ends your story with an abrupt, brutal impact.
death_by_falling_debris.death_message: Killed by a falling I-beam after surviving the wrecking ball.

death_by_falling_ball.description: The massive wrecking ball plummets from the broken crane, crushing the platform beneath its tremendous weight and taking you down with it.
death_by_falling_ball.death_message: Crushed by a falling wrecking ball after the crane cable snapped.

wrecking ball.base_description: The massive iron sphere hangs motionless.
wrecking ball.dormant: The crane sits eerily silent and still.
wrecking ball.swinging_for_qte: The wrecking ball drops and swings toward you!
wrecking ball.return_swing_warning: The chain groans as it reverses direction.
wrecking ball.falling_facade_qte: A heavy steel beam is falling!
wrecking ball.level_complete_survival: The ball rests embedded in the lower scaffolding.

examine.message: The portable generator powers several game stalls. It's making an irregular thumping sound, and the lights connected to it flicker ominously.

use.message: You approach the malfunctioning generator, wondering if you can fix it before it causes problems.

fix.message: You decide to try fixing the sputtering generator before it gets worse.

sputtering.description: An old diesel generator. It's coughing black smoke and rattling violently.
ambient_messages: The generator coughs loudly, a shower of sparks raining onto the dirt.

overheating.description: The generator's casing is glowing red hot. The rattling has become a deafening metallic screech.
ambient_messages: A loud POP echoes from the generator as a pressure valve blows!

critical_failure.description: The generator is a smoking, ruined husk.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: With a massive BANG, the generator blows, sending a lethal power surge down the buried cables!

examine.message: A sturdy metal fence surrounds the bull pen. It's currently safe to touch.
The metal fence crackles with electricity, blue arcs jumping between the metal bars! Anyone touching it would be severely shocked!

humming.description: A heavy-duty electric fence keeping the livestock contained.

power_surge.description: The wires of the fence suddenly glow with arcing blue electricity!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: A massive arc of electricity jumps from the fence directly into the prize bull!

examine.message: A massive prize bull with gleaming horns. It's currently calm, chewing lazily on hay.
The bull is now in a frenzy, pawing the ground and looking for anything to charge! Its eyes are wild with fear and rage!

docile.description: The bull chews its cud, occasionally snorting. A blue ribbon hangs on its pen.

panicked.description: Zapped with electricity, the bull bellows in pain and rage! It charges the fence repeatedly, weakening the structure!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The bull is breaking free! Type 'clear path' to move away or 'warn crowd' to alert others!
qte_context.success_message: You quickly move out of the charging path as the bull breaks through the damaged fence!
qte_context.alternative_success_message: You shout warnings to the nearby fairgoers, helping them escape the bull's path!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You freeze in panic as the enraged bull breaks free and charges directly at you!

escaped_charging_toward_food_court.description: The bull has broken free! It charges blindly through the fairgrounds, sending people screaming in all directions!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The beast breaches the perimeter and hits the midway!

escaped_people_warned.description: The bull has broken free, but thanks to your warning, most people have cleared the area! The bull charges toward the food court, with fewer people in its path.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The rampaging bull crashes into the central food stall with devastating force!

trampled_to_death.description: The bull's massive body slams into you at full speed. You feel a moment of crushing impact before everything goes black.
trampled_to_death.death_message: Trampled to death by an electrified and enraged prize bull.

spawn_entities.name: prize bull
spawn_entities.description: The prize bull sits bull, ominous and potentially dangerous.

prize bull.base_description: The prize bull sits bull, ominous and potentially dangerous.
prize bull.docile: The prize bull sits bull, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in docile state.
prize bull.panicked: The prize bull sits bull, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in panicked state.
prize bull.escaped_charging_toward_food_court: The prize bull sits bull, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in escaped charging toward food court state.
prize bull.escaped_people_warned: The prize bull sits bull, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in escaped people warned state.
prize bull.trampled_to_death: The prize bull sits bull, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in trampled to death state.

examine.message: A large food stall with multiple fryers and propane tanks. It's doing brisk business selling fried carnival foods.
The food stall structure is creaking and wobbling alarmingly. It looks like it could collapse at any moment!

stable.description: The food stall seems sturdy enough, busy with customers buying fried treats.

bull_impact.description: The charging bull slams into one of the support beams of the food stall! The entire structure wobbles precariously!

wobbling.description: The food stall support beams are cracking! Workers and customers flee as the structure begins to tilt!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The stall is collapsing! MASH to dodge falling debris!
qte_context.success_message: You dive clear as the food stall collapses in a shower of wood splinters and metal!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You fail to move in time as the heavy structure crashes down!

collapsing.description: The supports give way and the entire food stall comes crashing down! Deep fryers overturn, spilling their scalding contents!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: Scalding hot oil from multiple deep fryers cascades across the ground!

crushed_by_debris.description: The heavy food stall structure collapses directly onto you, crushing you beneath splintered wood and metal.
crushed_by_debris.death_message: Crushed beneath a collapsing food stall after a bull rampage.

spawn_entities.name: food stall
spawn_entities.description: The food stall structure sits food stall, ominous and potentially dangerous.

food stall.base_description: The food stall structure sits food stall, ominous and potentially dangerous.
food stall.stable: The food stall structure sits food stall, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in stable state.
food stall.bull_impact: The food stall structure sits food stall, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in bull impact state.
food stall.wobbling: The food stall structure sits food stall, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in wobbling state.
food stall.collapsing: The food stall structure sits food stall, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in collapsing state.
food stall.crushed_by_debris: The food stall structure sits food stall, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in crushed by debris state.

spawn_entities.name: glass of water
spawn_entities.description: A glass of water sits dangerously close to the edge of the surface.

take.message: As you reach for the glass, your sleeve catches it! It wobbles violently!

sitting.description: A glass of water sits near the edge.

deaths_breath.message: The unnatural wind catches the glass of water, rocking it on its base!

robo_vacuum.message: The robot vacuum bumps into the furniture, shaking the glass!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: {npc_name} bumped the furniture! The glass is tipping! Type 'catch'!
qte_context.success_message: You lunge and snatch the glass out of mid-air just before it shatters!
qte_context.failure_message: You fumble the grab. The glass hits the floor and shatters, spilling water everywhere.

saved_cup.description: You caught the glass and moved it to a safer, more stable location.

spilled.description: The glass shatters, creating a spreading puddle of water on the floor.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The water spreads rapidly across the floorboards.

glass of water.base_description: A glass of water sits dangerously close to the edge of the surface.
glass of water.sitting: A glass of water sits dangerously close to the edge of the surface. Currently in sitting state.
glass of water.tipping: The glass of water is teetering on the edge!
glass of water.saved_cup: The glass is safely pushed back from the edge.
glass of water.spilled: Shards of glass sit in a spreading puddle.

spreading.description: A puddle of water expands on the floor.

static_pool.description: A large puddle of water sits on the floor. It looks slippery... and conductive.

robo_vacuum.message: The robot vacuum drives straight into the water puddle!

frayed_lamp_cord.message: The spreading water makes contact with the exposed wire!

electrified.description: Current courses through the water! The puddle is now a deadly electrical trap.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: LIVE WIRE IN THE WATER! Type 'jump' to clear the puddle!
qte_context.success_message: You leap backward to dry ground just as the water begins to violently spark!
qte_context.failure_message: You step right into the energized water. Every muscle in your body instantly locks up.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: LIVE WIRE! {npc_name} is stepping into the puddle! Type 'grab'!
qte_context.success_message: You yank {npc_name} back by their collar just as the puddle erupts in deadly sparks!
qte_context.failure_message: {npc_name} steps squarely into the electrified puddle. They violently convulse as the current stops their heart, collapsing dead into the water.

fatal_electrocution.death_message: Electricity seizes your body. You convulse, then go still.

lethal_trap_active.description: The puddle is actively sparking with lethal voltage. It is deadly to cross.

spawn_entities.name: water puddle
spawn_entities.description: The conductive puddle sits on the floor, ominous and potentially dangerous.

water puddle.base_description: The conductive puddle sits on the floor, ominous and potentially dangerous.
water puddle.spreading: The puddle is actively expanding across the floor.
water puddle.static_pool: The water has settled into a large, highly conductive pool.
water puddle.electrified: The water is fiercely bubbling and sparking with raw electricity.
water puddle.lethal_trap_active: The puddle is an impassable hazard of sparking electricity.

use.message: You carefully wrap the exposed copper wire with the electrical tape, heavily insulating it and rendering the cord safe.
It's a bit messy, but you wrap the exposed copper wire with duct tape. It should be enough to stop an accidental arc.

exposed.description: The insulation on this lamp cord is worn away, exposing copper wire.

water_puddle.message: The wet floor completes the circuit, sending violent arcs of electricity into the puddle!

arcing_ground.description: Electricity arcs from the cord into the wet floor!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The puddle becomes charged with lethal voltage!

repaired_safe.description: The lamp cord has been safely wrapped with tape.

spawn_entities.name: frayed lamp cord
spawn_entities.description: The frayed lamp cord sits near the wall, an exposed electrical hazard.

frayed lamp cord.base_description: The frayed lamp cord sits near the wall, an exposed electrical hazard.
frayed lamp cord.exposed: The copper wire is bare and dangerous. It needs to be covered.
frayed lamp cord.arcing_ground: It is violently throwing sparks into the surrounding area!
frayed lamp cord.repaired_safe: The exposed wire is safely wrapped in thick tape.

examine.message: Scalding hot oil spreads across the ground from multiple overturned deep fryers. Steam rises from where it touches the cool ground.

spreading.description: Screaming hot oil from the deep fryers spreads rapidly across the ground, releasing clouds of burning steam.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: Scalding oil rushes toward your feet! Type 'jump back' to avoid severe burns!
qte_context.success_message: You leap onto a nearby bench just as the wave of hot oil passes beneath you!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: The scalding oil washes over your feet and ankles, causing immediate, agonizing burns!

spreading_toward_propane.description: From your safer position, you watch in horror as the oil flows toward a rack of propane tanks!

propane_tanks.message: The searing hot oil reaches the propane tanks, melting the plastic valve fittings!

severe_burns.description: You howl in pain as the oil burns your skin! Through tear-filled eyes, you see the oil continuing to spread toward a rack of propane tanks!

propane_tanks.message: The searing hot oil reaches the propane tanks, melting the plastic valve fittings!

oil_settled.description: The oil has finished spreading, though it continues to smoke and pop on the ground.

spawn_entities.name: pool of hot oil
spawn_entities.description: The spilled hot oil sits ground, ominous and potentially dangerous.

spawn_entities.name: ground
spawn_entities.description: The ground where the spilled hot oil is located.

pool of hot oil.base_description: The spilled hot oil sits ground, ominous and potentially dangerous.
pool of hot oil.spreading: The spilled hot oil sits ground, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in spreading state.
pool of hot oil.spreading_toward_propane: The spilled hot oil sits ground, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in spreading toward propane state.
pool of hot oil.severe_burns: The spilled hot oil sits ground, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in severe burns state.

ground.base_description: The ground where the spilled hot oil is located.
ground.spreading: The ground where the spilled hot oil is located. Currently in spreading state.
ground.spreading_toward_propane: The ground where the spilled hot oil is located. Currently in spreading toward propane state.
ground.severe_burns: The ground where the spilled hot oil is located. Currently in severe burns state.

food_wrapper: A discarded hotdog wrapper has a cartoon chef on it saying, 'It's explosively delicious!'
fair_pamphlet: An ad for the nightly fireworks display is circled. Next to it, someone has scrawled, 'The grand finale will be bigger than they expect.'

examine.message: Several large propane tanks sit connected to the deep fryers, ready for the dinner rush. They're securely stored in a metal rack.
The propane tanks' valve fittings are melting in the hot oil! Gas is beginning to hiss and escape!
The valve has failed! The tank is jetting highly flammable gas everywhere!

stable.description: Several large propane tanks sit connected to the deep fryers, safely stored in their rack.

valve_melting.description: Scalding oil from an overturned deep fryer is melting the plastic valve fittings on the propane tanks! Gas is beginning to escape with an ominous hiss!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The propane tanks are about to explode! Type 'run' to flee or 'close valve' to attempt a heroic fix!
qte_context.success_message: You sprint away from the leaking propane tanks, putting as much distance as possible between you and the inevitable explosion!
qte_context.alternative_success_message: Against all odds, you lunge forward and manage to tighten the main valve, stopping the gas leak!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You hesitate too long as the leaking propane finds an ignition source!

jetting_propane.description: The valve fails completely! One of the tanks turns into a rocket, shooting across the midway propelled by a jet of flammable gas!

ignited.description: The leaking propane ignites in a massive, searing fireball that tears the midway apart!
ignited.death_message: You and several other fair-goers are incinerated in a devastating propane tank explosion.

escaped_explosion.description: Behind you, the propane tanks detonate in a massive fireball, but you've put enough distance between yourself and the explosion to survive!

heroic_save.description: Despite the burns on your hands, you've managed to prevent a catastrophic explosion! The crisis is over, though several fairgoers were injured in the chaos.

spawn_entities.name: propane tanks
spawn_entities.description: A rack of large propane tanks connected to the food stall fryers.

propane tanks.base_description: A rack of large propane tanks connected to the food stall fryers.
propane tanks.stable: They are safely connected and ready for use.
propane tanks.valve_melting: The valves are melting! Gas is escaping rapidly!
propane tanks.jetting_propane: A tank is jetting gas like a rocket!
propane tanks.ignited: The tanks have exploded in a massive fireball.
