propane tanks.escaped_explosion: The charred remains of the propane tanks smolder in the wreckage.
propane tanks.heroic_save: The tanks are secure, though the area smells faintly of gas and burnt plastic.

environmental_omens.television: A commercial for a 'Pit-Stop' service shows a car falling through a bay floor into a dark void.
environmental_omens.radio: A song plays with the lyrics: '...don't look down, there's a hole in the ground.'
environmental_omens.window: The reflection shows a jagged metal spike protruding from the floor behind you.

hidden_by_spill.description: A thick layer of oil hides the edge of the service pit.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: YOU SLIPPED! A rusted rebar is below you! REACT!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: Your hands slip on the grease!

regained_balance.description: Your boots find purchase! You stumble back, but your movement kicks a heavy wrench into a pool of solvent nearby.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The flying wrench strikes a valve on the compressor line!

impaled_in_pit.description: Gravity wins. You fall backward into the darkness. A jagged piece of rebar meets you halfway.
impaled_in_pit.death_message: Impaled on rusted rebar in the maintenance pit.

environmental_omens.television: A news report shows a car falling from a lift, crushing a mechanic in a different city.
environmental_omens.radio: The audio is a rhythmic, metallic creak followed by a sharp hydraulic hiss.
environmental_omens.window: Reflection: You see the sedan above you wobble for a second, even when the real one is still.

stable.description: The hydraulic lift is holding steady. Someone is working underneath the sedan.

leaking_fluid.description: A high-pressure seal on the lift's piston pops! Red hydraulic fluid sprays across the floor.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The vibration of the failing lift jars the overhead compressor lines loose!

the_snap_chain.description: The car groans as it tilts! Above, the compressor hose SNAPS!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE LIFT IS FAILING! ACT!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: The car drops. There is no sound but the crunch of steel on bone.

target_saved_impact.description: You yank them clear just as the sedan slams into the concrete! The impact ruptures a fuel line!

fire_aftermath.description: Flames erupt in the garage, but you are both clear. The fire rages behind you.

fire_averted.description: You kill the power just in time! They scramble out, shaken but alive.

mechanical_stop.description: You jam the screwdriver into the mechanism! The car halts, teetering.

target_crushed.description: The lift fails completely. They never had a chance.

environmental_omens.television: A cartoon features a snake snapping at a balloon.
environmental_omens.radio: A high-pitched, escaping-air whistle drowns out the DJ for a split second.
environmental_omens.window: Reflection: A black cable on the wall appears to coil like a cobra.

vibrating.description: The overhead compressor hose vibrates dangerously.

whipping_line.description: The hose lashes out, striking the welding torch! Sparks shower the floor!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: A spark from the hose lands directly in the spreading fuel!

environmental_omens.television: A fire safety PSA demonstrates how quickly liquid fuel ignites.
environmental_omens.radio: Static that sounds exactly like crackling flames.
environmental_omens.window: The reflection of the garage walls appears to be glowing orange.

dormant.description: Fuel is pooling near the workbench, waiting for a spark.

ignited_flash.description: WHOOSH! The garage is engulfed in orange flame!

fire_spread.description: The burning fuel flows down the drain toward the exterior pumps!

leaking_solvent_drum.name: Leaking Solvent Drum
leaking_solvent_drum.description: A 55-gallon drum of industrial solvent. A steady drip from a rusted seam is forming a puddle.

smell: The air smells sharp and chemical, like nail polish remover on steroids.
floor: The concrete floor is stained with a discoloration that seems to be spreading.

examine.message: The label reads 'HIGHLY FLAMMABLE'. The drip is constant. If this spreads, it could reach the hot machinery.

use.message: You wrap the duct tape tightly around the rusted seam. It slows the leak significantly.

puddle_expanding.description: The puddle has grown. A stream of volatile liquid is now snaking its way under the door toward the Main Press Floor.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The solvent flows under the door and into the Main Press Floor!

gushing.description: The seam has split! Solvent pours out, flooding the floor with flammable liquid!

patched.description: The drum is taped up. It looks janky, but it's holding.

empty_drum.description: The drum is empty. The floor is a flammable disaster zone.

solvent_puddle_main_floor.name: Solvent Puddle (Main Floor)
solvent_puddle_main_floor.description: A slick, clear puddle of solvent is accumulating near the printing presses.

pooling_near_press.description: The chemical puddle creeps closer to the UV Curing Station. The fumes are dizzying.

overheating_uv_lamp.message: Sparks from the UV lamp hit the solvent vapors! WHOOSH!

ignited.description: The solvent catches fire! A wall of flame erupts, separating the room!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The heat triggers the building's fire suppression system! Sprinklers erupt in the next room!

overheating_uv_lamp.name: UV Curing Lamp
overheating_uv_lamp.description: A high-intensity ultraviolet lamp used to dry ink instantly. It hums with immense power.

humming.description: The lamp glows steadily, generating immense heat.

flickering.description: The UV bulb flickers violently. The cooling fan is whining.

sparking.description: Sparks rain down from the lamp housing onto the floor below!

bulb_explosion.description: The massive bulb explodes, showering the area with hot glass and plasma!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: Shrapnel from the exploding UV lamp slices into the crane cable holding the paper roll!

malfunctioning_sprinklers.name: Fire Sprinklers
malfunctioning_sprinklers.description: Standard industrial fire sprinklers mounted on the ceiling.

active_spraying.description: The sprinklers are activated! Water pours down in sheets, soaking everything in the room!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: Water floods the open control box of the industrial guillotine! It begins to spark wildly!

industrial_guillotine.name: Industrial Paper Guillotine
industrial_guillotine.description: A massive hydraulic blade used to shear through stacks of paper. The safety guard has been bypassed.

idle_unsafe.description: The machine idles. The operator reaches in to adjust a stack of paper.

short_circuiting.description: Water drips into the exposed circuitry! The machine spasms. The blade drops an inch, then retracts. The operator doesn't notice!

erratic_cycling.description:
The guillotine goes haywire! The blade slams down repeatedly at random intervals! CHUNK! CHUNK! CHUNK!

The operator is frozen in fear, their hands inches from the cutting zone!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: SAVE THEM! Type 'PULL' to grab the worker or 'STOP' to hit the emergency button!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You hesitate! The blade drops!

target_saved.description: You yank them back just as the massive blade slams down, biting deep into the metal bed where their hands were! They collapse, hyperventilating.

button_fails.description: You slam the emergency stop, but the water has fried the board! It does nothing! The blade falls...

target_killed_graphic.description: The blade descends with a wet crunch. The scream is cut brutally short.

suspended_paper_roll.name: Suspended Paper Roll
suspended_paper_roll.description: A 2-ton roll of paper hangs from a crane hook above the walkway.

swaying.description: The roll sways gently. The crane cable looks frayed.

cable_snapping.description: The cable unravels with a sound like a gunshot! The roll is falling!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: CRUSHING HAZARD! React!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You look up frozen...

crashed_safe.description: You roll beneath the press feed table as the paper roll obliterates the concrete where you stood!

flattened.death_message: Flattened by a 2-ton roll of paper.

heidelberg_press_catastrophe.name: The Heidelberg Behemoth
heidelberg_press_catastrophe.description: The gargantuan 'Heidelberg Behemoth' printing press. It spans the length of the room.

maintenance_mode.description: The press is silent. Someone is visible inside the open chassis, wrenching on a cyan ink roller. The 'SAFETY LOCKOUT' light is green.

lockout_failure.description:
A heavy padlock vibrates off the control desk and lands on the 'RESET' button!

The 'SAFETY LOCKOUT' light turns RED. The hydraulic safety cages slam shut around them with a deafening CLANG!

wash_cycle_activation.description:
The automated 'Wash-Up' cycle begins! High-pressure nozzles spray caustic solvent into the chassis!

They scream as the chemical mist blinds them, flailing and catching a sleeve on the gears!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THEY ARE TRAPPED! REACT!

roller_spin_up.description: You shatter the observation glass! The main drive motor engages with a subsonic hum. The massive steel rollers begin to turn slowly, winding their snagged coveralls in!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: JAM THE GEARS! MASH to throw a heavy object into the drive train!
qte_context.success_message: You hurl a metal chair into the open gear assembly! The machine screams as metal shears metal!
qte_context.failure_message: You can't find anything heavy enough in time!

roller_spin_up_delayed.description: You wasted precious seconds! The rollers catch their arm. There is a sickening pop!

target_saved_injured.description: The press grinds to a halt, the chair mangled in its gears. They fall out of the chassis, covered in cyan ink and solvent, coughing violently. They are alive.

crushed_by_rollers.description: The torque of the machine is unstoppable. They are pulled in. The scream is cut short as they are crushed between the Cyan and Magenta rollers.

loose_flywheel_bolt.name: Vibrating Flywheel Bolt
loose_flywheel_bolt.description: A heavy steel bolt on the main drive belt of the pinsetter is backing out of its threads.

rattling.description: The bolt vibrates violently with every cycle of the machine.

sheared_off.description: With a sharp CRACK, the bolt shears off and flies into the intricate sweep-arm gears!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The machinery screeches in protest as the sweep arm locks up!

rogue_pinsetter_machine.name: Automatic Pinsetter
rogue_pinsetter_machine.description: A massive, automated Brunswick pinsetter. It operates with terrifying, unthinking force.

operating_normally.description: The machine reliably clears the deck and drops a new rack of pins.

jammed_sweep.description:
The sweep arm is jammed halfway down the lane! The main drive motor is whining, trying to force it through the obstruction.

Someone climbs onto the lane to try and kick the arm free!

catastrophic_release.description: The sheared bolt grinds to dust! The jam clears instantly, and the pent-up kinetic energy releases all at once! The sweep arm violently knocks them into the pit!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THEY ARE IN THE PIT! THE PIN RACK IS DROPPING! REACT!

dragged_out_safe.description: You dive into the greasy, confined space of the pit and yank them backward just as the massive steel pin-rack slams down where their skull just was! You both scramble back up the lane, gasping.

stop_button_fails.description: You mash the Emergency Stop button on the wall, but the wiring is dead! The machine doesn't even slow down!

crushed_by_pins.description: The massive steel pin-table slams down with hydraulic force, perfectly setting ten bowling pins directly through their torso. The machine retracts, leaving a gruesome strike.

faulty_water_line.name: Faulty Water Line
faulty_water_line.description: A pressurized water line feeding the espresso machine has a loose brass fitting.

dripping.description: Water drips steadily from the fitting, pooling near a cluster of electrical cords.

spraying.description: The brass fitting completely gives way! A high-pressure stream of water blasts directly into the power strip on the floor!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The water arcs across the exposed outlets!

industrial_espresso_machine.name: Industrial Espresso Machine
industrial_espresso_machine.description: A massive, multi-boiler chrome espresso machine. The internal pressure is immense.

pressurizing.description: The machine hisses rhythmically, drawing water and heating it to near-boiling.

redlining.description:
The electrical surge overrides the thermostat! The internal boiler goes into overdrive, instantly flashing all the water into superheated steam! The pressure gauge shatters!

The machine begins to bulge, metallic groans echoing through the café!

shrapnel_explosion.description: The boiler ruptures with the force of a pipe bomb! Jagged chrome shrapnel, heavy brass portafilters, and a cloud of 300-degree steam blast outward!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE BOILER IS RUPTURING! REACT!

target_saved_burned.description: You tackle them to the ground just as the machine detonates! A cloud of superheated steam rolls over you both, causing severe burns, but the lethal shrapnel flies harmlessly overhead.

target_shielded.description: You grab a heavy metal baking tray and hold it up! BOOM! Shrapnel dents the tray with terrifying force, saving you both from being shredded.

target_shredded.description: The explosion rips through the Barista Station. A heavy brass portafilter rockets through the steam, striking them directly in the temple before the superheated water finishes the job.

surgical_light_ignition.name: Surgical Light Fixture
surgical_light_ignition.description: An articulated surgical spotlight mounted to the ceiling above the exam table.

oxygen_tank.message: The hissing oxygen floods the ceiling space right as the halogen fixture sparks!

flickering.description: The halogen bulb flickers, its wiring old and brittle.

arcing_current.description: The rushing gas knocks the adjustable surgical light loose! Its internal wiring tears, and a shower of bright blue sparks rains down into the hyper-oxygenated air!

oxygen_flash_fire.description: The sparks hit the pure oxygen! A blinding white wall of plasma flash-ignites, consuming the entire upper half of the room instantly!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE AIR IS BURNING! REACT!

target_saved.description: You grab them and dive under the heavy stainless steel examination table! The superheated air roars just inches above you, scorching the tile, but the thick metal table shields you from the blast.

target_incinerated.description: They bolt for the door, but the flash-fire moves faster. The pure oxygen fuels a localized inferno that instantly incinerates their clothes and sears their lungs.

main_breaker_box.name: Main Breaker Box
main_breaker_box.description: The central electrical nervous system for the Rec Center.

humming.description: The box hums with 240 volts of electricity.

catastrophic_surge.description: Sparks shower the pump room! The safety limiters melt down, sending a massive, unregulated power surge through the building!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The lights in the Natatorium flare brightly as the pool pump screams into overdrive!
A loud metallic CLANG echoes from the Gymnasium!

malfunctioning_pool_pump.name: Industrial Pool Pump
malfunctioning_pool_pump.description: The main intake pump for the pool. The safety grate in the deep end looks loose.

lethal_vortex.description:
The power surge forces the pump into maximum RPM! The safety grate shears off! A terrifying, inescapable whirlpool forms in the deep end!

The water catches them! They are dragged under, thrashing and screaming for help!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE VORTEX HAS THEM! REACT!

target_saved_pool.description: You hurl the safety hook! They catch the loop just before the intake pipe swallows them, and you heave them onto the wet tiles. They are coughing up water, but alive.

chair_jams_intake.description: You kick the rusted lifeguard chair into the pool! The heavy steel frame is sucked into the vortex and violently jams the intake pipe! The motor burns out, and they swim to the surface, gasping.

double_drowning.description: You dive in to save them, but the vortex is too strong. The undertow claims you both.
double_drowning.death_message: Drowned in the Natatorium intake pipe.

vortex_murder.description: You watch helplessly as the churning water pulls them down into the uncovered intake pipe. The water turns a sickening, frothy shade of red.

retractable_bleachers.name: Motorized Bleachers
retractable_bleachers.description: Tons of wood and steel held against the wall by a magnetic latch.

retracted.description: The bleachers are flush against the gym wall.

latch_failure.description: The power surge fries the magnetic lockout! The massive steel winch gives way! Tons of wood and iron unfold outward at terrifying speed, crashing down toward the gym floor!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE BLEACHERS ARE COLLAPSING! REACT!

target_saved_gym.description: You dive, tackling them out of the impact zone just as the front row of the bleachers slams into the hardwood floor with a deafening boom! Splinters shower over you, but you are both safe.

target_crushed_gym.description: The massive wooden and steel framework drops perfectly onto them. They are crushed instantly under tons of collapsing gymnasium seating.

unattended_welding_torch.name: Live Welding Torch
unattended_welding_torch.description: An oxy-acetylene torch left resting dangerously close to the main crane's hydraulic brake line.

burning.description: The blue flame hisses loudly. It's currently burning a black scorch mark into the steel column.

melting_line.description: The intense heat begins to melt the thick rubber casing of the crane's hydraulic brake line!

line_severed.description: With a high-pressure hiss, the hydraulic line severs completely! Fluid sprays everywhere!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: Without hydraulic pressure, the massive crane winch at the base of the tower unlocks!

crane_winch_brake.name: Crane Winch Mechanism
crane_winch_brake.description: The massive motorized spool of steel cable holding the crane's load suspended high above.

locked.description: The brake calipers hold the massive spool securely.

freewheeling.description: The hydraulic brakes fail! The heavy steel cable begins to spool out at terrifying speed, whining as it spins out of control!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: High above, a massive wrecking ball drops and begins to swing in a deadly pendulum arc!

use.message: You swing the mallet and hit the pad. The puck shoots up and rings the bell. You win a small prize.

force.message: With a surge of adrenaline, you slam the mallet down with incredible force! The puck rockets upwards, shattering the bell mechanism. The heavy bell teeters for a moment before falling backward off the stall with a deafening CRASH!

operational.description: A classic 'Test-Your-Strength' carnival game stands ready for challengers. A heavy bell sits at the top.

bell_falls.description: The strength-tester is broken, its bell missing from the top.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The falling bell crashes onto the roof of the livestock pen fence line!

spawn_entities.name: the strength tester
spawn_entities.description: The test-your-strength game sits Games Area, ominous and potentially dangerous.

spawn_entities.name: games area
spawn_entities.description: The Games Area where the test-your-strength game is located.

the strength tester.base_description: The test-your-strength game sits Games Area, ominous and potentially dangerous.
the strength tester.operational: The test-your-strength game sits Games Area, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in operational state.
the strength tester.bell_falls: The test-your-strength game sits Games Area, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in bell falls state.

games area.base_description: The Games Area where the test-your-strength game is located.
games area.operational: The Games Area where the test-your-strength game is located. Currently in operational state.
games area.bell_falls: The Games Area where the test-your-strength game is located. Currently in bell falls state.

latched.description: A heavy steel gate, secured by a simple but sturdy-looking slide-bolt latch. A metal crossbar keeps the latch from vibrating loose.

impacted_by_bell.description: The impact of the bell has dislodged the crossbar! The slide-bolt is now the only thing holding the gate closed, and it's rattling violently from the agitated movements of the bull inside.

latch_failed.description: The vibrations were too much! The latch slides free and the gate swings open!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The prize bull, enraged and freed, charges out of its pen and into the crowded midway!

spawn_entities.name: the bull pen gate
spawn_entities.description: The bull pen gate sits prize bull pen, ominous and potentially dangerous.

spawn_entities.name: prize bull pen
spawn_entities.description: The prize bull pen where the bull pen gate is located.

the bull pen gate.base_description: The bull pen gate sits prize bull pen, ominous and potentially dangerous.
the bull pen gate.latched: The bull pen gate sits prize bull pen, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in latched state.
the bull pen gate.impacted_by_bell: The bull pen gate sits prize bull pen, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in impacted by bell state.
the bull pen gate.latch_failed: The bull pen gate sits prize bull pen, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in latch failed state.

prize bull pen.base_description: The prize bull pen where the bull pen gate is located.
prize bull pen.latched: The prize bull pen where the bull pen gate is located. Currently in latched state.
prize bull pen.impacted_by_bell: The prize bull pen where the bull pen gate is located. Currently in impacted by bell state.
prize bull pen.latch_failed: The prize bull pen where the bull pen gate is located. Currently in latch failed state.

hunting_target.description: A massive, enraged bull is stampeding through the fairgrounds, destroying everything in its path as it zeroes in on its target!

target_acquired.description: The bull spots its prey and lowers its horns for a final, lethal charge!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The bull is charging directly at the target! Do you intervene?

bull_hits_structure.description: You distract the bull! It veers off course and slams into the nearest structure!

Rusty.death_message: The bull clips Rusty the carny, throwing him back into his own stall.

dormant.description: A vintage-style metal photo booth, offering a moment of privacy from the chaos.

live_current.description: The photo booth crackles with deadly electrical energy! A live wire is touching its metal frame.
live_current.death_message: The moment Brittany touched the inside of the metal photo booth, thousands of volts coursed through her body, killing her instantly.

dropped_phone: A saved photo on the phone shows a girl in a photo booth, but her image is distorted by what looks like a massive electrical arc.
carnival_game_prize: A cheap plastic keychain of a lightning bolt.

spawn_entities.name: photo booth electrocution
spawn_entities.description: The photo booth electrocution sits photo booth, ominous and potentially dangerous.

photo booth electrocution.base_description: The photo booth electrocution sits photo booth, ominous and potentially dangerous.
photo booth electrocution.dormant: The photo booth electrocution sits photo booth, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in dormant state.
photo booth electrocution.live_current: The photo booth electrocution sits photo booth, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in live current state.

idle.description:
Metal scaffold stands before you, looking rickety as fuck.
Careful, the whole thing could come down if you breathe on it too closely.

collapsing.description: The metal beams scream as they twist! {companion_name} is frozen in the path of the debris!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: {companion_name} IS IN DANGER! CHOOSE!
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You hesitate! The metal crashes down on both of you!

companion_saved_injured.description: You tackle {companion_name} out of the way! They hit the ground hard, twisting their ankle, but they are alive.

companion_crushed.description: You dive for cover. Behind you, there is a sickening crunch and then silence. {companion_name} is gone.

resolved_safe.description: The dust settles. The scaffolding is a twisted heap of metal.

resolved_tragedy.description: The dust settles on a scene of horror. You are alone now.

spawn_entities.name: falling scaffolding
spawn_entities.description: The falling scaffolding sits scaffolding, ominous and potentially dangerous.

falling scaffolding.base_description: The falling scaffolding sits scaffolding, ominous and potentially dangerous.
falling scaffolding.collapsing: The falling scaffolding sits scaffolding, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in collapsing state.
falling scaffolding.companion_saved_injured: The falling scaffolding sits scaffolding, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in companion saved injured state.
falling scaffolding.companion_crushed: The falling scaffolding sits scaffolding, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in companion crushed state.
falling scaffolding.resolved_safe: The falling scaffolding sits scaffolding, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in resolved safe state.
falling scaffolding.resolved_tragedy: The falling scaffolding sits scaffolding, ominous and potentially dangerous. Currently in resolved tragedy state.

wobbling.description: The ceiling fan sways violently, clicking rhythmically.

violent_shaking.description: The fan looks like it's about to tear out of the plaster!

calming_down.description: The fan settles into a steady, safe rhythm. It was just an unbalanced blade.

spawn_entities.name: wobbling ceiling fan
spawn_entities.description: The wobbling fan sits in the room, ominous and potentially dangerous.

wobbling ceiling fan.base_description: The wobbling fan sits in the room, ominous and potentially dangerous.
wobbling ceiling fan.wobbling: The ceiling fan sways violently, clicking rhythmically.
wobbling ceiling fan.violent_shaking: The fan looks like it's about to tear out of the plaster!
wobbling ceiling fan.calming_down: The fan settles into a steady, safe rhythm.

examine.message: You crouch and press a hand to the floor. The boards flex alarmingly under even light pressure. You can see light through a crack between two planks.

use.message: With a Mechanic's eye for load paths, you wedge the support beam under the joists from below. The floor firms up noticeably — the danger is neutralised.
You shove the beam under the floor but you're not sure if it's doing anything useful. The creaking continues.
You slap tape over the worst cracks. It won't slow the rot but it might not collapse if you step on it.

move.message: You try to sprint across but the floor gives a terrible crack beneath you!

collapsing_fresnel_lens.message: The immense, multi-ton weight of the shattered brass and glass instantly obliterates the floor's structural integrity!

swinging_wrecking_ball.message: The wrecking ball smashes the floorboards to kindling instantly!

leaking_pipe.message: Water seeping from above saturates the already-fragile floorboards. They darken and sag.

gas_leak.message: Vibrations from the gas pressure have worked through the structure, stressing the joists.

creaking.description: The {object_name} groans softly underfoot but holds. For now.

groaning.description: Every step draws a deep, structural groan from the {object_name}. Dust falls from below.

on_state_entry_consequences.reason: The floor sounds ready to give way.

waterlogged.description: The {object_name} is dark with moisture, swollen and yielding. It won't take much more weight.

splintering.description: Hairline fractures web across the {object_name}. You can hear individual fibres snapping with each step.

on_state_entry_consequences.reason: The floor is about to give.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: FLOOR CRACKING! Type 'back' or 'jump' to get to solid ground!
qte_context.success_message: You throw yourself backward onto solid flooring just as the boards crack behind you.
qte_context.failure_message: You freeze a half-second too long. The floor goes.

collapsing_qte.description: The {object_name} gives way under you! You're falling through into the room below!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: FALLING! Mash to catch yourself on the edge!
qte_context.success_message: Your fingers find a joist. You haul yourself back up, arms burning, splinters in your palms.
qte_context.failure_message: You plunge through. The fall is short but brutal.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THEY ARE FALLING! Mash to grab their arm!
qte_context.success_message: You dive to the splintering edge, your hand clamping around their wrist! Your shoulder screams in agony, but you haul them up over the lip of the hole.
qte_context.failure_message: You lunge for them, your fingers brushing their sleeve, but gravity is too fast. They plunge through the floor into the darkness below.

fell_through.description: You hit the floor below hard, landing in a heap of rotten wood and plaster dust.

on_state_entry_consequences.reason: You just fell through the floor.

npc_fell_through.description: They vanish through the hole with a scream, followed by a sickening thud from the room below. A cloud of plaster dust billows up.

collapsed_hole.description: A ragged hole now punctuates the floor where the {object_name} used to be. The edges are still crumbling.

on_state_entry_consequences.title: Path Changed
on_state_entry_consequences.message: The hole blocks direct passage. You'll need to find another route or drop down deliberately.

cracked_but_passable.description: The {object_name} is fractured but still bridging the gap. You can cross it carefully — one at a time.

temporarily_braced.description: Duct tape covers the worst cracks. The boards flex less. This won't last more than a few turns.

reinforced.description: The floor feels solid now. A support beam underneath has redistributed the load properly.

spawn_entities.name: warped floorboard
spawn_entities.description: A section of flooring that flexes and groans underfoot, the wood dark with age and moisture damage.

warped floorboard.base_description: A section of flooring that flexes and groans underfoot.
warped floorboard.creaking: The boards are discoloured and soft but they're holding. Barely.
warped floorboard.groaning: Deep structural groans travel up through your shoes with every step. Dust trickles from the ceiling below.
warped floorboard.waterlogged: The wood is swollen dark with moisture, yielding under even light pressure. This section is ready to fail.
warped floorboard.splintering: Fracture lines web across the boards. You can see the room below through the gaps.
warped floorboard.collapsing_qte: The floor is actively giving way beneath you.
warped floorboard.fell_through: A ragged hole where the floor used to be.
warped floorboard.collapsed_hole: A hole that drops to the room below. The edges are raw splinter.
warped floorboard.cracked_but_passable: Fractured but bridging the gap — barely. Cross carefully.
warped floorboard.temporarily_braced: Taped over but still flexing. A temporary fix at best.
warped floorboard.reinforced: Solid. The support beam underneath is doing its job.

examine.message: Blackened scorch marks radiate out from the {object_name}. The insulation on the wire is cracked and brittle — probably decades old. You can smell hot plastic.

use.message: You isolate the live circuit and disconnect the faulty section cleanly. No more arc risk.
You manage to disconnect the hot lead. The arcing stops, though you're not sure you did it right.
You wrap the exposed wire in insulating tape. It won't last forever but the immediate arc risk is reduced.
You grab the wrench and immediately feel current bite through the uninsulated handle. You yank your hand back, teeth clacking together.
You open the panel, locate the correct breaker, and trip it manually. Power to this circuit is cut.
You fiddle with the fuse panel but you're not sure which breaker controls this circuit. You flip one — the lights go out but the buzzing continues.

force.message: You yank the junction box cover off with brute force. Live wires spring outward, snapping and throwing sparks!

gas_leak.message: Arcing electricity finds the gas fumes. The ignition is instantaneous.

water_puddle.message: Current jumps from the exposed wiring into the spreading water. The puddle goes live.

leaking_pipe.message: Water spraying from a burst pipe reaches the wiring. A short circuit snaps and throws sparks.

flickering.description: The lights served by the {object_name} flicker intermittently. A faint buzz comes from behind the wall.

arcing.description: Small arcs of electricity snap from the {object_name} with each flicker. The smell of hot insulation is sharp.

arcing_short.description: The {object_name} throws a sustained shower of sparks. Anyone within arm's reach risks a shock.

on_state_entry_consequences.reason: Live electrical arcing at close range.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: LIVE ARC! Type 'back' to get clear before it shorts completely!
qte_context.success_message: You throw yourself clear as the arc snaps and the fuse blows with a crack.
qte_context.failure_message: Current finds you. Your muscles seize for one terrible moment.

blown_fuse.description: The {object_name} is dead — fuse blown, circuit dead. The arcing has stopped but so has all power on this circuit.

electrical_fire.description: Insulation ignites along the {object_name}. Flame crawls up the wall from the wiring.

on_state_entry_consequences.reason: Electrical fire spreading on the wall.

on_state_entry_special_action.message_in_target: The lights flicker violently. A surge is overloading the circuit.

ignited.description: The {object_name} is fully ablaze. The fire is spreading into the wall cavity.
ignited.death_message: The electrical fire consumed the room. You couldn't find a way out in time.

on_state_entry_special_action.message_in_target: Smoke begins drifting from the ceiling vents.

taped_over.description: Insulating tape wraps the worst of the exposed {object_name}. The flickering has stopped — for now.

disconnected_unstable.description: The hot lead on the {object_name} is disconnected but the neutral is still live. You're not sure it's truly safe.

safely_disabled.description: The {object_name} is properly isolated. No current, no arc risk.

spawn_entities.name: frayed wall outlet
spawn_entities.description: A wall outlet with blackened scorch marks around it and visibly degraded wiring at the junction.

frayed wall outlet.base_description: A wall outlet surrounded by scorch marks. The wiring behind it is decades old.
frayed wall outlet.flickering: The outlet buzzes faintly. The light it powers flickers every few seconds.
frayed wall outlet.arcing: Small arcs snap across the terminals with each flicker. The smell of hot plastic is sharp.
frayed wall outlet.arcing_short: Sustained sparking from the outlet. You'd take a shock just reaching for it.
frayed wall outlet.blown_fuse: Dead. The fuse has blown and this circuit is off. Cold and silent.
frayed wall outlet.electrical_fire: Flames are crawling up the wall from the outlet. The paint is blackening.
frayed wall outlet.ignited: The wall is on fire from the outlet outward.
frayed wall outlet.taped_over: Wrapped in insulating tape. The buzzing has stopped.
frayed wall outlet.disconnected_unstable: One lead is disconnected but you're not confident it's fully safe.
frayed wall outlet.safely_disabled: Properly isolated. The circuit is dead.

examine.message: The {object_name} is dark with mineral deposits and corrosion. Water beads along its length and drips steadily. The joint is wrapped in old plumber's tape that's dried out and cracking.

use.message: You fit the wrench around the loose joint and throw your weight into it. With a metallic screech, the fitting tightens. The leaking stops immediately.
You wrap the leaking joint tightly with duct tape. It stops the immediate flow, but the tape is already starting to bulge.
You stuff the rag around the leaking joint. It soaks up the water for now, but it won't hold for long.

force.message: You wrench the pipe with your bare hands. The corroded joint snaps. Water explodes outward in a pressurised jet.

weak_floorboards.message: Water from the pipe soaks into the flooring below, accelerating the wood rot.

faulty_wiring.message: Water spraying from the burst pipe reaches the exposed wiring above.

dripping.description: The {object_name} drips steadily, a small dark patch spreading on the floor below.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: Water from the pipe collects into a puddle on the floor.

leaking.description: A steady stream of water runs from the {object_name}. The floor is slick and the damp smell is heavy.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: Water from the pipe spreads across the floor.

pressurised.description: The {object_name} is bulging at the joint. Water sprays in an intermittent jet, hissing under pressure.

on_state_entry_consequences.reason: The pipe is about to blow.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: PIPE ABOUT TO BURST! Use wrench on pipe, or type 'back' to get clear!
qte_context.success_message: You get clear just before the joint blows. Water jets across the room behind you.
qte_context.failure_message: The pipe bursts in your face — scalding water and rust hit you at pressure.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE TARGET IS STANDING RIGHT NEXT TO THE BULGING PIPE! Type 'tackle'!
qte_context.success_message: You tackle them to the ground just as the pipe blows like a shotgun blast of scalding water and rust overhead!
qte_context.failure_message: The joint bursts! A blast of highly pressurized, scalding hot steam and rusted metal shards blasts them directly in the face, melting the flesh from their skull.

burst.description: The {object_name} has split open. Water pours freely, pooling across the floor and running down the walls.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The burst pipe floods the floor.

taped.description: The {object_name} is wrapped in duct tape. The dripping has stopped but the tape is already discolouring.

cloth_stuffed.description: A cloth is jammed around the joint, soaking up the worst of the drip. It won't last.

sealed.description: The {object_name} is properly tightened. The dripping has stopped and the floor is drying.

spawn_entities.name: corroded ceiling pipe
spawn_entities.description: A corroded pipe running along the ceiling, a steady drip marking the floor below it.

corroded ceiling pipe.base_description: A corroded pipe running along the ceiling. Water drips from a failing joint.
corroded ceiling pipe.dripping: Slow, steady drips. The floor below is dark with moisture.
corroded ceiling pipe.leaking: A proper stream now — the joint is clearly failing.
corroded ceiling pipe.pressurised: The joint is bulging. Water sprays intermittently in a pressurised jet.
corroded ceiling pipe.burst: The joint has blown. Water pours freely.
corroded ceiling pipe.taped: Wrapped in duct tape. Holding for now.
corroded ceiling pipe.cloth_stuffed: A cloth is stuffed around the joint, darkening as it soaks through.

examine.message: Several treads are visibly rotted — one is missing entirely. The newel post wobbles when you test it. You can see where nails have pulled free from the stringers. These stairs will not take kindly to anything heavier than a careful step.

use.message: You shore up the weakest stringers with the support beam, distributing the load properly. The stairs aren't beautiful but they'll hold.
You tie the rope to a ceiling joist and thread it through the baluster gaps as a makeshift safety line. It won't stop a collapse but it might slow a fall.

move.message: You put your weight on the first cracked tread. The whole staircase shifts.
You launch yourself up the stairs at a dead sprint, taking three steps at a time before the structure has time to react!

rickety.description: The {object_name} creak and flex but bear weight if you step carefully.

cracking.description: A loud crack rings out as a tread splinters under your weight. The banister gives a sharp lurch.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: STEP CRACKING! Type 'jump' to leap to the next solid tread!
qte_context.success_message: You throw your weight forward onto the next tread before the cracked one gives way.
qte_context.failure_message: Your foot punches through the rotten tread. Your shin catches the broken edge.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: {npc_name} freezes as the wood splinters under them! Type 'push'!
qte_context.success_message: You violently shove {npc_name} upward onto a solid landing just as the step crumbles to dust beneath them!
qte_context.failure_message: {npc_name} falls through the splintering gap, their leg snapping backward with a sickening CRACK. They hang trapped in the broken timber.

failing.description: The {object_name} shudder with every step. Half the treads are gone or cracked. You're committed now.

step_qte.description: The staircase lurches sideways! A stringer is pulling away from the wall!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: STAIRCASE FAILING! Mash to scramble to the landing!
qte_context.success_message: You scramble up the last few treads on all fours and throw yourself onto the landing as the stairs fall away behind you.
qte_context.failure_message: You lose your footing. The staircase takes you down with it.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: {npc_name} is sliding back as the stairs detach! MASH to grab their hand!
qte_context.success_message: You catch their hand and haul them over the edge just as the entire staircase tears away and crashes into the floor below!
qte_context.failure_message: Their fingers slip from yours. {npc_name} screams as they ride the collapsing avalanche of rotten timber and rusted nails all the way to the bottom.

partial_collapse.description: A section of the {object_name} has given way. The upper half still stands but getting to it requires a jump.

full_collapse.description: The {object_name} gives way completely, dumping you onto the floor below in an avalanche of rotten timber.

on_state_entry_consequences.reason: You fell with the collapsing staircase.

full_collapse.death_message: The staircase collapsed completely. The fall and the timber buried you.

collapsed_passable.description: The {object_name} are mostly gone. A few structural remnants form an improvised ladder. Crossable with care.

cleared_by_sprint.description: You made it across before the stairs had time to fail. Behind you, the {object_name} sag and crack — one more person and they're done.

shored_up.description: The {object_name} feel solid now. The solid board has taken the load off the worst sections.

spawn_entities.name: rickety staircase
spawn_entities.description: A wooden staircase with visibly rotted treads and a banister that wobbles loosely.

rickety staircase.base_description: A staircase with rotted treads and a loose banister. Something to approach carefully.
rickety staircase.rickety: It creaks and flexes but holds careful weight. Several treads look rotten.
rickety staircase.cracking: A tread has just cracked audibly. The banister lurched.
rickety staircase.failing: Half the treads are gone or broken. The staircase is visibly leaning.
rickety staircase.step_qte: The stringer is pulling away from the wall. The whole structure is going.
rickety staircase.partial_collapse: A section has given way. The upper portion is reachable with a jump.
rickety staircase.full_collapse: A pile of rotten timber where the stairs used to be.
rickety staircase.collapsed_passable: The wreckage still forms something climbable if you're careful.
rickety staircase.cleared_by_sprint: You made it. The stairs are failing behind you.
rickety staircase.shored_up: Reinforced with a support beam. Solid enough now.

examine.message: The {object_name} leans a few degrees away from the wall. The mounting brackets are rust-brown and the drywall around them has crumbled. Whatever's on here is held up by habit more than physics.

use.message: You drive fresh screws into the studs behind the shelf, bypassing the rusted brackets. The lean corrects. It's secure.
You tie the shelf to a ceiling joist with rope, taking its weight off the brackets. Crude but effective.

take.message: You reach for the item carefully. Your movement disturbs the shelf's balance.

force.message: You push against the {object_name}. It tilts alarmingly, groaning from its brackets.

weak_floorboards.message: The floor impact vibration rocks the overloaded shelf.

collapsing_stairs.message: Vibrations from the collapsing stairs travel through the walls, setting the shelf swaying.

deaths_breath.message: The unnatural cold wind passes through the room, catching the unbalanced shelf.

loaded.description: The {object_name} leans slightly from the wall under the weight of its contents.

swaying.description: The {object_name} sways gently, its brackets ticking against the wall. Things near the edge look precarious.

tipping.description: The {object_name} is going over! Its contents slide toward the edge!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: SHELF TIPPING! Type 'back' to get clear, or 'catch' to try to stop it!
qte_context.success_message: You throw yourself sideways as the shelf and its contents crash to the floor behind you.
qte_context.failure_message: The shelf comes down on you. Its contents follow.

fallen_clear.description: The {object_name} has come down. Its contents are scattered across the floor — some broken, some intact.

on_state_entry_consequences.title: Path Blocked
on_state_entry_consequences.message: The fallen shelf and its debris partially block the room. Items may be buried in the rubble.

fallen_on_player.description: The {object_name} crashes down onto you, its contents raining down in a painful cascade.

on_state_entry_consequences.reason: A shelf just fell on you.

on_state_entry_consequences.title: Pinned Briefly
on_state_entry_consequences.message: The shelf pins you for a moment. You shove it off, dazed and bleeding.

secured.description: The {object_name} is flush against the wall now, properly anchored into the studs.

rope_secured.description: The {object_name} is held by a rope to the ceiling. It won't fall, though the rope creaks with the weight.

spawn_entities.name: overloaded wall shelf
spawn_entities.description: A wall-mounted shelf leaning away from its brackets under the weight of what's stacked on it.

overloaded wall shelf.base_description: A shelf leaning from the wall. The brackets are visibly failing.
overloaded wall shelf.loaded: Leaning a few degrees. The brackets are rust-red. Everything on it looks held up by luck.
overloaded wall shelf.swaying: Swaying gently. A few items near the edge are about to go on their own.
overloaded wall shelf.fallen_clear: On the floor. Contents scattered everywhere.
overloaded wall shelf.fallen_on_player: On the floor. On you, briefly.
overloaded wall shelf.secured: Flush against the wall. Properly anchored.
overloaded wall shelf.rope_secured: Held up by rope tied to the ceiling. Unconventional but holding.

examine.message: The {object_name} on the {support_object} is balanced on the very edge. A strong draft or the wrong footstep would be enough.

use.message: You push the {object_name} back from the edge and set it firmly on the {support_object}. The immediate danger is gone.
You lash the {object_name} to the {support_object} with rope so it can't slide off.

take.message: You reach for the {object_name} — it shifts, throwing its balance.

force.message: You deliberately shove the {object_name} off the {support_object}.

deaths_breath.message: The unnatural wind catches the {object_name}, rocking it on the {support_object}.

weak_floorboards.message: The floor impact shockwave travels up through the walls, knocking the {object_name} off the {support_object}.

collapsing_stairs.message: The structural collapse sends vibrations through the walls, rocking the {object_name}.

balanced.description: The {object_name} sits on the {support_object}, balanced near the edge.

wobbling.description: The {object_name} wobbles on the {support_object}. It's going to fall.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: FALLING! Type 'dodge' to get clear!
qte_context.success_message: You sidestep as the {object_name} crashes to the floor where you were standing.
qte_context.failure_message: The {object_name} clips you as it falls.

landed.description: The {object_name} lies on the floor where it fell. Missed you.

hit_player.description: The {object_name} catches you on its way down.

steadied.description: The {object_name} is pushed back from the edge and sitting securely on the {support_object}.

spawn_entities.name: heavy object
spawn_entities.description: An object balanced precariously near the edge of its surface.

heavy object.base_description: An object balanced on the very edge of the surface it rests on.
heavy object.balanced: Perched near the edge. Nothing is holding it there but inertia.
heavy object.steadied: Pushed back from the edge. Secure now.

use.message: You place the bucket under the drip. The water plinks harmlessly into the plastic container, preventing a puddle.
You toss the towel onto the floor beneath the drip. It soaks up the moisture, rendering the hazard inert for now.

examine.message: A thin bead of moisture clings to the ceiling. It's been there a while.
Water is dripping steadily now. A small puddle is forming on the floor.
A wide, shallow puddle has spread across the floor. It reflects the light.

forming.description: A bead of moisture clings to the ceiling.

sensory_feedback.audio: A faint, rhythmic plinking sound.
sensory_feedback.visual: A glint of moisture on the ceiling.

dripping.description: Water drips steadily from above, forming a small puddle.

sensory_feedback.audio: A steady drip... drip... drip.
sensory_feedback.visual: A thin stream of water traces down the wall.

puddle_formed.description: A wide, shallow puddle covers part of the floor.

sensory_feedback.audio: Your footsteps splash.
sensory_feedback.visual: Light reflects off the wet floor.

faulty_wiring.message: Sparks hit the puddle. The water LIGHTS UP with current!

deaths_breath.message: The temperature plummets. The puddle freezes into a nearly invisible sheet of ice.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The puddle has spread across the floor.

electrified_puddle.description: The puddle crackles with lethal electrical current.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: ELECTRIFIED FLOOR! JUMP BACK!
qte_context.success_message: You leap backward just in time!
qte_context.failure_message_timeout: The current seizes your muscles. You can't let go.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: {npc_name} doesn't see the sparks! Type 'pull' to yank them back!
qte_context.success_message: You yank them backward by the shirt collar just as the water erupts in deadly blue arcs!
qte_context.failure_message: {npc_name} steps squarely into the charged water. The current cooks them from the inside out as they drop dead into the puddle.

sensory_feedback.audio: A vicious crackling and buzzing fills the room.
sensory_feedback.visual: Blue-white arcs dance across the surface of the water.

electrified_puddle.death_message: The electrified water seizes every muscle in your body. You drop face-first into the puddle.

electrocution_death.death_message: The electrified water seizes every muscle in your body. You drop face-first into the puddle.

black_ice.description: An invisible sheet of ice coats the floor.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: BLACK ICE! KEEP YOUR BALANCE!
qte_context.success_message: You catch yourself just before falling.
qte_context.failure_message_timeout: Your feet go out from under you.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: {npc_name} slips wildly on the black ice! Type 'catch'!
qte_context.success_message: You grab their arm and steady them before they can hit the floor.
qte_context.failure_message: {npc_name} slips entirely, flying backward. Their head strikes the sharp edge of nearby furniture with a sickening wet CRACK. They're dead before they hit the ground.

sensory_feedback.visual: The floor has an odd, glassy sheen.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: You slam into the ground. Pain shoots through your hip and elbow.

contained.description: The dripping water is falling safely into a bucket. It poses no threat.

mopped.description: A soaked towel sits where the puddle used to be, neutralizing the danger.

examine.message: A bolt on the assembly. It looks tight enough.
The bolt is visibly rattling. It's working itself loose.

use.message: You tighten the bolt. It holds... for now.

seated.description: A bolt sits snugly in its housing.

vibrating.description: A bolt rattles audibly in its housing.

sensory_feedback.audio: A faint rattling sound, like something working itself free.

collapsing_stairs.message: The vibration shakes the bolt completely free!

falling_scaffolding.message: The shaking knocks the bolt loose!

dislodged.description: The bolt has fallen free. Something above groans.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: You hear a metallic *clink* as something hits the floor, followed by a deep, structural groan.

sensory_feedback.audio: A deep, unsettling groan from above.
sensory_feedback.visual: A small bolt rolls across the floor.
sensory_feedback.tactile: A subtle vibration runs through the walls.

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: The scaffolding shifts dangerously without its fastener.

catastrophic_failure.description: The structure above sags visibly. It won't hold much longer.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: THE CEILING IS COMING DOWN! MOVE!
qte_context.success_message: You dive clear as debris crashes behind you.

collapsed_safe.description: The structure has partially collapsed. The path is blocked with debris but you're unharmed.

crushed.death_message: Tons of metal crash down. You never had a chance.

spawn_entities.name: lighter
spawn_entities.description: A cheap plastic lighter lies on the ground.

take.message: You pick up the lighter. It still has fuel.

use.message: You flick the lighter. A small flame dances. You close it.

on_ground.description: A lighter lies on the floor.

gas_leak.message: The lighter's residual heat meets the gas fumes. A flower of flame blooms.

robo_vacuum.message: The robot vacuum bumps the lighter, sending it spinning across the floor!

kicked_by_vacuum.description: The lighter has been knocked to a new position.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: You hear a small plastic *clatter* as something skids across the floor.

leaking_fuel.description: The lighter's casing has cracked. Fluid seeps out.

sensory_feedback.audio: A faint chemical smell.
sensory_feedback.visual: A dark stain spreads slowly on the floor.

faulty_wiring.message: A spark lands in the lighter fluid. It catches instantly!

ignited_by_gas.description: The lighter has ignited the gas.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: The lighter ignites. A wall of flame erupts across the room.
The spilled lighter fluid catches fire. Flames race across the floor.

examine.message: The room is sealed. A small ventilation panel hums quietly on the wall.
The ventilation panel has stopped humming. The air feels thick.
The vent is dead. Your breathing echoes off the walls. Each breath feels shallower than the last.

use.message: You bang on the vent panel. It rattles but doesn't open. It needs a tool.

force.message: You throw your weight into the vent panel.

on_success.message: The panel bursts free! Fresh air rushes in.

on_failure.message: It won't budge. The edges are fused shut.

fresh_air.description: The sealed room has breathable air. A ventilation panel hums on the wall.

sensory_feedback.audio: A quiet mechanical hum from the ventilation.

stale_air.description: The air in the sealed room feels thick and warm. The ventilation has stopped.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: The ventilation fan clicks... stutters... and goes silent. The air immediately feels heavier.

sensory_feedback.audio: Silence. Just your own breathing.
sensory_feedback.tactile: The air is warm and damp against your skin.

suffocating.description: You can barely breathe. Black spots swim in your vision.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: Your lungs burn. You can't get a full breath. Panic sets in.

sensory_feedback.audio: Your heartbeat. Loud. Fast. Too fast.
sensory_feedback.visual: Black spots swim at the edges of your vision.
sensory_feedback.tactile: Your fingers tingle. Your chest is tight.

hallucinating.description: The walls are closing in. Or are they? You can't tell anymore.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: Shapes move in the corners. Whispers that aren't there. The walls pulse like breathing flesh.

sensory_feedback.audio: Whispers. Scratching. Your own name, spoken by nobody.
sensory_feedback.visual: The walls breathe. Shadows have fingers.
sensory_feedback.tactile: Cold hands on the back of your neck.

poltergeist_events.message: A voice you recognize says your name. But nobody is here.
The door handle turns by itself. Then stops.

asphyxiation.death_message: You slump against the wall. Your last breath is barely a sigh. The sealed room becomes your coffin.

vent_opened.description: Fresh air streams through the opened vent panel. You can breathe again.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: Cool air floods the room. You gulp it down. Your vision clears.

spawn_entities.name: fire alarm
spawn_entities.description: A fire alarm unit is mounted on the wall.

examine.message: A standard fire alarm panel. The green indicator light is steady.
The alarm is SCREAMING. Red strobes flash. You can barely think, let alone hear anything else.

use.message: You yank the cover off and rip the wires out. The alarm dies with a pathetic warble.

force.message: You smash the alarm panel with your fist. It crunches and goes silent.

silent.description: A fire alarm sits quietly on the wall. Its green light blinks slowly.

gas_leak.message: The fire alarm detects the blaze and erupts into a deafening wail!

faulty_wiring.message: Smoke triggers the fire alarm! A piercing shriek fills the room!

blaring.description: The fire alarm is screaming. Red strobes flash across every surface.

sensory_feedback.audio: A deafening, pulsing shriek that makes your teeth ache.
sensory_feedback.visual: Red strobes flash in a disorienting rhythm.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: The alarm is deafening. You can't hear yourself think — let alone hear what's happening around you.

disabled.description: The alarm panel hangs open, wires dangling. Silent.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: Blessed silence. Your ears ring in the aftermath.

spawn_entities.name: stray cat
spawn_entities.description: A thin, skittish cat watches you from the shadows.

examine.message: A lean, wild-eyed cat. Its ears are flat. It watches you with suspicion.
The cat is panicking — fur on end, hissing, looking for an escape.

lurking.description: A stray cat watches from the shadows.

sensory_feedback.audio: A soft, almost inaudible padding of paws.
sensory_feedback.visual: Two yellow eyes glint from a dark corner.

deaths_breath.message: The cat hisses violently at the sudden cold and bolts!

blaring_alarm.message: The alarm sends the cat into a frenzy! It streaks across the room!

startled.description: The cat is panicking — crashing through everything in its path.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: The cat knocks something over as it bolts. You hear a crash from across the room.

precarious_object.message: The cat slams into the precariously balanced object, sending it toppling!

precarious_water_cup.message: The cat's tail whips the cup off the edge!

oxygen_tank.message: The cat crashes into the tank, knocking the valve assembly!

fled.description: The cat is gone. It left a trail of small chaos.

examine.message: A thin haze hangs in the air. It smells acrid — something is burning nearby.
Dense smoke fills the room. Your eyes sting. Each breath feels like swallowing ash.

light_smoke.description: A thin haze of smoke drifts through the vents.

sensory_feedback.audio: A faint crackling from somewhere distant.
sensory_feedback.visual: Wisps of smoke curl from the ventilation grate.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: Smoke is seeping in through the vents. Something is burning — but not in this room.

thick_smoke.description: Dense smoke chokes the room. You can barely see.

sensory_feedback.audio: Your own coughing. Nothing else penetrates the haze.
sensory_feedback.visual: Visibility is down to arm's length.
sensory_feedback.tactile: Your lungs burn with every breath.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: The smoke thickens. Your eyes stream with tears. You can barely see the exits.

suffocating_smoke.description: The smoke is a solid wall. Moving is a guess.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: HOLD YOUR BREATH! FIND THE EXIT!
qte_context.success_message: You stumble through the smoke and find clearer air.
qte_context.failure_message_timeout: You collapse, choking. The smoke fills your lungs.

smoke_death.death_message: You gasp for air that isn't there. Your knees buckle. The floor rises to meet you. The smoke takes you gently, like falling asleep.

examine.message: There's a faint chemical smell. Like rotten eggs. Gas?
The gas smell is overpowering. Your head swims. One spark and this room goes up.

faint_smell.description: A faint chemical smell hangs in the air.

sensory_feedback.audio: A distant hissing.
sensory_feedback.visual: The air looks slightly distorted near the vent.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: You catch a whiff of something chemical. It's coming from the vents.

faulty_wiring.message: A spark meets the gas fumes! WHOOMPF!

strong_fumes.description: The room reeks of gas. The air feels combustible.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: The gas is thick now. Your vision blurs. You need to get out or ventilate this room.

sensory_feedback.visual: The air shimmers with invisible fumes.
sensory_feedback.tactile: Your eyes water. Your head pounds.

faulty_wiring.message: The concentrated gas ignites with a deafening BOOM!

dropped_lighter.message: The lighter's residual heat meets the gas. A fireball erupts.

ignited_fumes.description: The room is engulfed in flame.
ignited_fumes.death_message: The gas ignites. The room becomes a furnace. There is no time to scream.

on_state_entry_special_action.message_in_target: An explosion of smoke blasts through the vents!

examine.message: The lights flicker erratically. You hear a buzzing from inside the walls.
Sparks spit from the wall outlets. The wiring in this building is overloaded.

unstable_power.description: The lights flicker. Power is unstable.

sensory_feedback.audio: A low-frequency hum from the walls.
sensory_feedback.visual: The lights pulse and dim rhythmically.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: The lights stutter. Something is wrong with the power in this wing.

arcing_outlets.description: Outlets spark. The wiring is dangerously overloaded.

sensory_feedback.audio: Sharp crackling from the wall sockets.
sensory_feedback.visual: Blue-white sparks spit from an outlet.

on_state_entry_consequences.message: Sparks shoot from the outlets. The electrical system is cascading.

water_puddle.message: Sparks from the outlet hit the puddle. The water crackles with current!

condensation_drip.message: The arcing outlet energizes the wet floor!

electrified_outlet_puddle.description: The floor is electrified from a shorted outlet.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: LIVE WIRE IN THE WATER! {npc_name} is about to step in! WARN THEM!
qte_context.success_message: You yanked {npc_name} back just before their foot hit the water!
qte_context.failure_message_timeout: {npc_name} steps into the puddle. The current locks their muscles until they go still.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: LIVE WIRE IN THE WATER! JUMP!
qte_context.success_message: You leap clear of the electrified puddle!

electrocution.death_message: Electricity seizes your body. You convulse, then go still.

television: A commercial shows a sign falling off a building.
A news segment about structural failures in aging commercial signage.
radio: Sound of metal groaning and snapping overhead.
window: Reflection of the marquee letters shows one of them noticeably missing. You look up but the sign is intact.

examine.message: The X in CINEPLEX buzzes loudly and flickers. Looking closer, you notice the mounting bracket on the X is visibly bent — someone hit it with something, or it has been failing for a long time.

buzzing.description: One of the letters on the marquee overhead buzzes and flickers.

bracket_failing.description: The buzzing letter rocks slightly. The mounting bracket is giving way.

letter_falling_qte.description: With a metallic SHRIEK, the heavy letter tears free and plummets!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: A MARQUEE LETTER IS FALLING! Wait for green... then DODGE!
qte_context.success_message: You lunge sideways! The heavy metal letter smashes into the pavement exactly where you were standing, sending shards skittering across the concrete.
qte_context.failure_message: The letter connects with a sound like a car crash.

letter_struck_player.description: The heavy metal letter glances off your shoulder. The impact is stunning.

letter_grounded.description: A large metal letter from the marquee lies on the ground, bent and cracked. The sign above now reads CINEPLEX with a conspicuous gap.

television: A cooking show demonstrates flambe, the flames leap unnaturally high.
radio: Sound of a sudden WHOOSH of fire, then cheerful music.
window: Reflection of lights momentarily looks like a burst of flame near the condiment stand.

examine.message: The butter pump gurgles ominously, dispensing short bursts of hot oil in between its programmed cycles. The wall outlet behind it has a suspicious dark stain — soda, maybe. Or maybe not.

use.message: You press the dispensing button. Nothing comes out for a moment — then too much comes out at once, spraying hot butter-flavored oil across the counter and dangerously close to the wall outlet.

gurgling.description: The butter pump gurgles with a low mechanical hum. It is too hot and the pressure relief looks blocked.

overpressure.description: The butter pump starts dispensing uncontrollably, spraying hot oily liquid across the condiment stand and toward the nearby wall outlet!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: Hot oil is spraying toward the electrical outlet! Type 'unplug' to cut the power!
qte_context.success_message: You yank the pump's power cord from the wall before the oil reaches the outlet. The pump dies with a final greasy splurt.
qte_context.failure_message: The hot oil reaches the outlet before you can act.

electrical_contact.description: The hot oil reaches the wall outlet. There is a loud ZAP and the lights on this circuit flicker out!

triggers_hazard_on_state_change.message: Condensation from the soda fountain collects near the sparking outlet.

pump_disabled.description: The butter pump sits silent and unplugged. The counter around it is a mess of congealed oil, but the crisis is averted.

television: Screen fills with violent blue static.
A commercial for electrical safety shows an arc flash.
radio: Loud electrical ZAP sound interrupts the broadcast.
window: Reflection shows blue sparks dancing on the wall near a box.

examine.message: An old neon transformer mounted to the wall. The casing is cracked and blue-white arcs of electricity occasionally snap between exposed contacts. This should have been replaced years ago.

crackling.description: The neon transformer crackles with intermittent arcs of electricity.

sustained_arc.description: The transformer is sustaining a continuous arc now — electricity crawls up the wall casing.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The transformer is arcing! Leave the corridor or find the breaker?
qte_context.success_message: You back away from the transformer as it continues to arc.
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You freeze as the arc reaches a metal conduit on the wall.

breaker_check.description: You find the circuit breaker panel at the end of the corridor and kill the right circuit. The transformer goes dark with a final, petulant snap.

arc_unresolved.description: The transformer continues to arc, casting blue-white flashes through the narrow corridor.

arc_fire.description: The arc reaches the extension cords on the floor. A small fire starts at the junction.

examine.message: The floor here is sticky and dark with dried soda. Recent enough to still be slick. Someone spilled something large.

slick_floor.description: The tile floor is slick with a large soda spill.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: Slick floor! Watch your footing — wait for green, then CATCH yourself!
qte_context.success_message: Your foot slips, but you catch the wall. Crisis averted. Dignity: questionable.
qte_context.failure_message: Your foot goes out from under you. You hit the floor hard.

navigated_safely.description: You step carefully around the worst of the spill.

slipped.description: You landed on the sticky tile floor. Your knees and your pride are both bruised.

television: Trailer glitches, shows brief flash of fire.
window: Reflection of the booth window looks like flickering fire.

examine.message: The projector's cooling fans are running at maximum speed and losing. A thin haze of smoke is visible around the lens housing. The smell of hot plastic is unmistakable. This machine is dying.

running_hot.description: The projector runs hotter than it should. The fans are audible from the theater floor.

smoke_visible.description: A faint haze of smoke drifts from the projection booth. The projectionist is not responding to the phone.

fire_in_booth.description: Flames are visible behind the projection window! The booth is on fire!

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The booth is on fire! Evacuate the theater or use the fire extinguisher?
qte_context.success_message: You make your choice as the smoke thickens.
qte_context.failure_message_wrong_input: You hesitate too long as the fire spreads.

fire_suppressed.description: You grab the extinguisher mounted by the exit and manage to suppress the booth fire before it spreads to the curtains. The projector is dead. The movie dies with it.

theater_evacuated.description: You trigger the fire alarm. The theater clears rapidly. The booth fire consumes the projector but does not spread further. The building survives. Whether the projectionist survived is a different question.

theater_fire_spreads.description: The fire jumps from the booth to the heavy stage curtains. The theater fills with smoke.

examine.message: The metal crash bar is coated in multiple layers of paint. It has not been used in years. Possibly ever. This counts as a fire code violation.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: The bar is painted shut! MASH to force it!
qte_context.success_message: With a creak of protesting paint and metal, the bar gives and the door swings open into the night air.
qte_context.failure_message: The bar will not budge. You need more force or more time.

painted_shut.description: The emergency exit bar is solidly painted shut. It will require significant force to open.

forced_open.description: The exit door stands open. Peeling paint curls around the doorframe like confetti.

exposed_drain.message: The overloaded pump hits maximum RPM! Without the safety grate in place, a terrifying, swirling vortex forms in the deep end!

screaming.description: The pump is shaking violently, pulling water at three times its rated capacity.

lethal_vortex.description: A massive, inescapable whirlpool has formed in the deep end of the pool.

qte_context.ui_prompt_message: {npc_name} dives into the pool to investigate the noise. The vortex instantly drags them under! They are thrashing, screaming for help!

vortex_murder.description: You stand at the edge of the pool, your face blank, as the churning water pulls them down into the intake pipe. The water turns a sickening shade of red. It is done.
